authors_text: Julian Knodt,Joe Bartusek,Seung-Hwan Baek,Felix Heide
title: Neural Ray-Tracing: Learning Surfaces and Reflectance for Relighting and View Synthesis
title_zh: 神经光线追踪：学习表面和反射率以进行重新照明和视图合成
comment: 10 pages, 9 figures
comments: 10 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Recent neural rendering methods have demonstrated accurate view interpolation by predicting volumetric density and color with a neural network. Although such volumetric representations can be supervised on static and dynamic scenes, existing methods implicitly bake the complete scene light transport into a single neural network for a given scene, including surface modeling, bidirectional scattering distribution functions, and indirect lighting effects. In contrast to traditional rendering pipelines, this prohibits changing surface reflectance, illumination, or composing other objects in the scene. In this work, we explicitly model the light transport between scene surfaces and we rely on traditional integration schemes and the rendering equation to reconstruct a scene. The proposed method allows BSDF recovery with unknown light conditions and classic light transports such as pathtracing. By learning decomposed transport with surface representations established in conventional rendering methods, the method naturally facilitates editing shape, reflectance, lighting and scene composition. The method outperforms NeRV for relighting under known lighting conditions, and produces realistic reconstructions for relit and edited scenes. We validate the proposed approach for scene editing, relighting and reflectance estimation learned from synthetic and captured views on a subset of NeRV's datasets.

abstract_zh: 最近的神经渲染方法通过使用神经网络预测体积密度和颜色来证明了精确的视图插值。尽管可以在静态和动态场景上监督这种体积表示，但现有方法隐式地将完整场景光传输烘焙到给定场景的单个神经网络中，包括表面建模、双向散射分布函数和间接照明效果。与传统的渲染管道相比，这禁止更改表面反射率、照明或组合场景中的其他对象。在这项工作中，我们明确地模拟了场景表面之间的光传输，并依靠传统的集成方案和渲染方程来重建场景。所提出的方法允许在未知光条件和经典光传输（例如路径跟踪）下进行 BSDF 恢复。通过学习传统渲染方法中建立的表面表示的分解传输，该方法自然有利于编辑形状、反射率、照明和场景合成。该方法在已知照明条件下的重新照明方面优于 NeRV，并为重新照明和编辑的场景生成逼真的重建。我们验证了所提出的场景编辑、重新照明和反射率估计方法，这些方法是从 NeRV 数据集子集的合成和捕获视图中学习的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的光线追踪方法，通过显式建模场景表面与光照传输，实现场景重照明和视图合成。
AI.motivation: 现有神经渲染方法将场景光照传输固化在单一网络中，导致无法灵活修改表面反射特性或照明条件，而传统渲染管线能更好地支持场景编辑与复杂光照计算。
AI.method: 结合传统渲染方程与神经网络，显式建模表面反射分布函数（BSDF）及光传输过程，利用路径追踪等经典算法实现可编辑的场景重建与重照明。
AI.result: 在已知光照条件下优于NeRV方法，在合成与真实场景数据集上均能生成逼真的重照明与编辑后场景重建结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合神经学习与传统渲染理论，提出的方法实现了更灵活的场景编辑、重照明与反射估计，为神经渲染提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Seunghyun Lee,Byung Cheol Song
title: Interpretable Embedding Procedure Knowledge Transfer via Stacked Principal Component Analysis and Graph Neural Network
title_zh: 通过堆叠主成分分析和图神经网络进行可解释的嵌入过程知识转移
comment: accepted at AAAI2021
comments: accepted at AAAI2021
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) is one of the most useful techniques for light-weight neural networks. Although neural networks have a clear purpose of embedding datasets into the low-dimensional space, the existing knowledge was quite far from this purpose and provided only limited information. We argue that good knowledge should be able to interpret the embedding procedure. This paper proposes a method of generating interpretable embedding procedure (IEP) knowledge based on principal component analysis, and distilling it based on a message passing neural network. Experimental results show that the student network trained by the proposed KD method improves 2.28% in the CIFAR100 dataset, which is higher performance than the state-of-the-art (SOTA) method. We also demonstrate that the embedding procedure knowledge is interpretable via visualization of the proposed KD process. The implemented code is available at https://github.com/sseung0703/IEPKT.

abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）是轻量级神经网络最有用的技术之一。尽管神经网络有一个明确的目的是将数据集嵌入到低维空间中，但现有的知识离这个目的还很远，并且只提供了有限的信息。我们认为良好的知识应该能够解释嵌入过程。本文提出了一种基于主成分分析生成可解释嵌入过程（IEP）知识并基于消息传递神经网络对其进行提炼的方法。实验结果表明，通过所提出的 KD 方法训练的学生网络在 CIFAR100 数据集中提高了 2.28%，这比最先进的（SOTA）方法的性能更高。我们还证明了嵌入过程知识可以通过所提出的 KD 过程的可视化来解释。实现的代码可在 https://github.com/sseung0703/IEPKT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于主成分分析和图神经网络的知识迁移方法，以生成可解释的嵌入过程知识。
AI.motivation: 现有的知识蒸馏方法未能充分解释嵌入过程，因此本文旨在生成可解释的嵌入过程知识以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 本文结合主成分分析和消息传递神经网络，生成可解释的嵌入过程知识，并通过知识蒸馏方法将其传递给学生网络。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在CIFAR100数据集上，使用该方法训练的学生网络性能提升了2.28%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法不仅提高了学生网络的性能，还通过可视化展示了嵌入过程知识的可解释性。

authors_text: Shiba Kuanar,Vassilis Athitsos,Dwarikanath Mahapatra,Anand Rajan
title: Multi-scale Deep Learning Architecture for Nucleus Detection in Renal Cell Carcinoma Microscopy Image
title_zh: 用于肾细胞癌显微镜图像中细胞核检测的多尺度深度学习架构
comment: This article has been removed by arXiv administrators because the submitter did not have the authority to grant the license applied at the time of submission
comments: This article has been removed by arXiv administrators because the submitter did not have the authority to grant the license applied at the time of submission
abstract: Clear cell renal cell carcinoma (ccRCC) is one of the most common forms of intratumoral heterogeneity in the study of renal cancer. ccRCC originates from the epithelial lining of proximal convoluted renal tubules. These cells undergo abnormal mutations in the presence of Ki67 protein and create a lump-like structure through cell proliferation. Manual counting of tumor cells in the tissue-affected sections is one of the strongest prognostic markers for renal cancer. However, this procedure is time-consuming and also prone to subjectivity. These assessments are based on the physical cell appearance and suffer wide intra-observer variations. Therefore, better cell nucleus detection and counting techniques can be an important biomarker for the assessment of tumor cell proliferation in routine pathological investigations. In this paper, we introduce a deep learning-based detection model for cell classification on IHC stained histology images. These images are classified into binary classes to find the presence of Ki67 protein in cancer-affected nucleus regions. Our model maps the multi-scale pyramid features and saliency information from local bounded regions and predicts the bounding box coordinates through regression. Our method validates the impact of Ki67 expression across a cohort of four hundred histology images treated with localized ccRCC and compares our results with the existing state-of-the-art nucleus detection methods. The precision and recall scores of the proposed method are computed and compared on the clinical data sets. The experimental results demonstrate that our model improves the F1 score up to 86.3% and an average area under the Precision-Recall curve as 85.73%.

abstract_zh: 透明细胞肾细胞癌（ccRCC）是肾癌研究中最常见的瘤内异质性形式之一。 ccRCC 起源于近曲肾小管的上皮衬里。这些细胞在 Ki67 蛋白存在的情况下发生异常突变，并通过细胞增殖形成肿块状结构。对受影响组织切片中的肿瘤细胞进行手动计数是肾癌最强的预后标志物之一。然而，这个过程非常耗时，而且容易带有主观性。这些评估基于细胞的物理外观，并且观察者内部差异很大。因此，更好的细胞核检测和计数技术可以成为常规病理研究中评估肿瘤细胞增殖的重要生物标志物。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于深度学习的检测模型，用于 IHC 染色组织学图像上的细胞分类。这些图像被分为二元类别，以查找受癌症影响的细胞核区域中是否存在 Ki67 蛋白。我们的模型映射来自局部有界区域的多尺度金字塔特征和显着性信息，并通过回归预测边界框坐标。我们的方法验证了 Ki67 表达对经过局部 ccRCC 处理的 400 个组织学图像的影响，并将我们的结果与现有最先进的细胞核检测方法进行比较。在临床数据集上计算并比较所提出方法的精确度和召回率分数。实验结果表明，我们的模型将 F1 分数提高了 86.3%，精确率-召回率曲线下的平均面积提高了 85.73%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的多尺度架构，用于检测肾细胞癌显微图像中的细胞核。
AI.motivation: 手动计数肾癌组织切片中的肿瘤细胞耗时且主观性强，需开发更准确的细胞核检测技术以提高病理评估效率。
AI.method: 通过映射多尺度金字塔特征和局部区域显著性信息，结合回归预测边界框坐标，实现对IHC染色图像中Ki67蛋白阳性细胞核的分类与检测。
AI.result: 在400张局部ccRCC组织图像上，模型F1分数达86.3%，平均精确率-召回率曲线下面积为85.73%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效提升了细胞核检测性能，为肾癌病理分析提供了可靠工具，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: Multi-scale Deep Learning Architecture for Nucleus Detection in Renal Cell Carcinoma Microscopy Image 用于肾细胞癌显微镜图像中细胞核检测的多尺度深度学习架构 Clear cell renal cell carcinoma (ccRCC) is one of the most common forms of intratumoral heterogeneity in the study of renal cancer. ccRCC originates from the epithelial lining of proximal convoluted renal tubules. These cells undergo abnormal mutations in the presence of Ki67 protein and create a lump-like structure through cell proliferation. Manual counting of tumor cells in the tissue-affected sections is one of the strongest prognostic markers for renal cancer. However, this procedure is time-consuming and also prone to subjectivity. These assessments are based on the physical cell appearance and suffer wide intra-observer variations. Therefore, better cell nucleus detection and counting techniques can be an important biomarker for the assessment of tumor cell proliferation in routine pathological investigations. In this paper, we introduce a deep learning-based detection model for cell classification on IHC stained histology images. These images are classified into binary classes to find the presence of Ki67 protein in cancer-affected nucleus regions. Our model maps the multi-scale pyramid features and saliency information from local bounded regions and predicts the bounding box coordinates through regression. Our method validates the impact of Ki67 expression across a cohort of four hundred histology images treated with localized ccRCC and compares our results with the existing state-of-the-art nucleus detection methods. The precision and recall scores of the proposed method are computed and compared on the clinical data sets. authors_text: Woosung Choi,Minseok Kim,Marco A. Martínez Ramírez,Jaehwa Chung,Soonyoung Jung
title: AMSS-Net: Audio Manipulation on User-Specified Sources with Textual Queries
title_zh: AMSS-Net：通过文本查询对用户指定源进行音频操作
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables, under reviewing of ACMMM 21
comments: 10 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables, under reviewing of ACMMM 21
abstract: This paper proposes a neural network that performs audio transformations to user-specified sources (e.g., vocals) of a given audio track according to a given description while preserving other sources not mentioned in the description. Audio Manipulation on a Specific Source (AMSS) is challenging because a sound object (i.e., a waveform sample or frequency bin) is `transparent'; it usually carries information from multiple sources, in contrast to a pixel in an image. To address this challenging problem, we propose AMSS-Net, which extracts latent sources and selectively manipulates them while preserving irrelevant sources. We also propose an evaluation benchmark for several AMSS tasks, and we show that AMSS-Net outperforms baselines on several AMSS tasks via objective metrics and empirical verification.
summary: This paper proposes a neural network that performs audio transformations to user-specified sources (e.g., vocals) of a given audio track according to a given description while preserving other sources not mentioned in the description. Audio Manipulation on a Specific Source (AMSS) is challenging because a sound object (i.e., a waveform sample or frequency bin) is `transparent'; it usually carries information from multiple sources, in contrast to a pixel in an image. To address this challenging problem, we propose AMSS-Net, which extracts latent sources and selectively manipulates them while preserving irrelevant sources. We also propose an evaluation benchmark for several AMSS tasks, and we show that AMSS-Net outperforms baselines on several AMSS tasks via objective metrics and empirical verification.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种神经网络，它根据给定的描述对给定音轨的用户指定源（例如人声）执行音频转换，同时保留描述中未提及的其他源。对特定源（AMSS）的音频操作具有挑战性，因为声音对象（即波形样本或频率箱）是“透明的”；与图像中的像素相比，它通常携带来自多个来源的信息。为了解决这个具有挑战性的问题，我们提出了 AMSS-Net，它提取潜在源并有选择地操纵它们，同时保留不相关的源。我们还提出了针对多个 AMSS 任务的评估基准，并通过客观指标和实证验证表明 AMSS-Net 在多个 AMSS 任务上的表现优于基线。

AI.tldr: 提出AMSS-Net网络，根据文本描述对音频中用户指定的声源进行操作，同时保持其他未提及声源不变。
AI.motivation: 音频操作中，声源信息混合导致难以单独操作特定来源，需解决透明性问题。
AI.method: 提出AMSS-Net，通过提取潜在声源并选择性操作，结合评估基准进行验证。
AI.result: AMSS-Net在多个AMSS任务中优于基线方法，通过客观指标和实证验证。
AI.conclusion: AMSS-Net有效解决特定声源操作问题，为AMSS任务提供有效方法和评估基准。

authors_text: Mohak Bhardwaj,Balakumar Sundaralingam,Arsalan Mousavian,Nathan Ratliff,Dieter Fox,Fabio Ramos,Byron Boots
title: STORM: An Integrated Framework for Fast Joint-Space Model-Predictive Control for Reactive Manipulation
title_zh: STORM：反应操纵的快速联合空间模型预测控制的集成框架
comment: Accepted for oral presentation at the Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL), 2021. Code available at: https://github.com/NVlabs/storm
comments: Accepted for oral presentation at the Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL), 2021. Code available at: https://github.com/NVlabs/storm
abstract: Sampling-based model-predictive control (MPC) is a promising tool for feedback control of robots with complex, non-smooth dynamics, and cost functions. However, the computationally demanding nature of sampling-based MPC algorithms has been a key bottleneck in their application to high-dimensional robotic manipulation problems in the real world. Previous methods have addressed this issue by running MPC in the task space while relying on a low-level operational space controller for joint control. However, by not using the joint space of the robot in the MPC formulation, existing methods cannot directly account for non-task space related constraints such as avoiding joint limits, singular configurations, and link collisions. In this paper, we develop a system for fast, joint space sampling-based MPC for manipulators that is efficiently parallelized using GPUs. Our approach can handle task and joint space constraints while taking less than 8ms~(125Hz) to compute the next control command. Further, our method can tightly integrate perception into the control problem by utilizing learned cost functions from raw sensor data. We validate our approach by deploying it on a Franka Panda robot for a variety of dynamic manipulation tasks. We study the effect of different cost formulations and MPC parameters on the synthesized behavior and provide key insights that pave the way for the application of sampling-based MPC for manipulators in a principled manner. We also provide highly optimized, open-source code to be used by the wider robot learning and control community. Videos of experiments can be found at: https://sites.google.com/view/manipulation-mpc

abstract_zh: 基于采样的模型预测控制（MPC）是一种很有前途的工具，用于对具有复杂、非平滑动力学和成本函数的机器人进行反馈控制。然而，基于采样的 MPC 算法的计算要求本质一直是其应用于现实世界中高维机器人操作问题的关键瓶颈。以前的方法通过在任务空间中运行 MPC，同时依靠低级操作空间控制器进行联合控制来解决这个问题。然而，由于在 MPC 公式中不使用机器人的关节空间，现有方法无法直接考虑非任务空间相关的约束，例如避免关节限制、奇异配置和连杆碰撞。在本文中，我们开发了一种用于机械臂的快速、基于联合空间采样的 MPC 系统，该系统使用 GPU 进行高效并行化。我们的方法可以处理任务和关节空间约束，同时用不到 8ms~(125Hz) 的时间来计算下一个控制命令。此外，我们的方法可以通过利用从原始传感器数据中学习到的成本函数，将感知紧密地集成到控制问题中。我们通过将其部署在 Franka Panda 机器人上来验证我们的方法，以执行各种动态操作任务。我们研究了不同成本公式和 MPC 参数对综合行为的影响，并提供了关键见解，为有原则地在机械臂上应用基于采样的 MPC 铺平了道路。我们还提供高度优化的开源代码，供更广泛的机器人学习和控制社区使用。实验视频可在以下网址找到：https://sites.google.com/view/manipulation-mpc

AI.tldr: 本文提出STORM框架，通过GPU加速实现高效的关节空间采样型模型预测控制（MPC），解决高维机械臂动态操作中的实时控制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于任务空间的MPC无法直接处理关节限制、奇异构型等关节空间约束，且计算效率难以满足实时控制需求。
AI.method: 设计基于GPU并行化的关节空间MPC框架，整合任务空间与关节空间约束，利用感知数据学习的代价函数实现感知与控制的紧密集成。
AI.result: 在Franka Panda机械臂上实现8ms内完成控制指令计算（125Hz），验证了方法在动态操作任务中的有效性，并提供开源代码。
AI.conclusion: STORM框架为机械臂提供了兼顾约束处理与实时性的MPC解决方案，推动了基于采样方法的MPC在操作机器人领域的应用。

search_text: STORM: An Integrated Framework for Fast Joint-Space Model-Predictive Control for Reactive Manipulation STORM：反应操纵的快速联合空间模型预测控制的集成框架 Sampling-based model-predictive control (MPC) is a promising tool for feedback control of robots with complex, non-smooth dynamics, and cost functions. However, the computationally demanding nature of sampling-based MPC algorithms has been a key bottleneck in their application to high-dimensional robotic manipulation problems in the real world. Previous methods have addressed this issue by running MPC in the task space while relying on a low-level operational space controller for joint control. However, by not using the joint space of the robot in the MPC formulation, existing methods cannot directly account for non-task space related constraints such as avoiding joint limits, singular configurations, and link collisions. In this paper, we develop a system for fast, joint space sampling-based MPC for manipulators that is efficiently parallelized using GPUs. Our approach can handle task and joint space constraints while taking less than 8ms~(125Hz) to compute the next control command. Further, our method can tightly integrate perception into the control problem by utilizing learned cost functions from raw sensor data. We validate our approach by deploying it on a Franka Panda robot for a variety of dynamic manipulation tasks. We study the effect of different cost formulations and MPC parameters on the synthesized behavior and provide key insights that pave the way for the application of sampling-based MPC for manipulators in a principled manner. We also provide highly optimized, open-source code to be used by the wider robot learning and control community. Videos of experiments can be found at: https://sites.google.com/view/manipulation-mpc 基于采样的模型预测控制（MPC）是一种很有前途的工具，用于对具有复杂、非平滑动力学和成本函数的机器人进行反馈控制。然而，基于采样的 MPC 算法的计算要求本质一直是其应用于现实世界中高维机器人操作问题的关键瓶颈。以前的方法通过在任务空间中运行 MPC，同时依靠低级操作空间控制器进行联合控制来解决这个问题。然而，由于在 MPC 公式中不使用机器人的关节空间，现有方法无法直接考虑非任务空间相关的约束，例如避免关节限制、奇异配置和连杆碰撞。在本文中，我们开发了一种用于机械臂的快速、基于联合空间采样的 MPC 系统，该系统使用 GPU 进行高效并行化。我们的方法可以处理任务和关节空间约束，同时用不到 8ms~(125Hz) 的时间来计算下一个控制命令。此外，我们的方法可以通过利用从原始传感器数据中学习到的成本函数，将感知紧密地集成到控制问题中。我们通过将其部署在 Franka Panda 机器人上来验证我们的方法，以执行各种动态操作任务。我们研究了不同成本公式和 MPC 参数对综合行为的影响，并提供了关键见解，为有原则地在机械臂上应用基于采样的 MPC 铺平了道路。我们还提供高度优化的开源代码，供更广泛的机器人学习和控制社区使用。实验视频可在以下网址找到：https://sites.google.com/view/manipulation-mpc 本文提出STORM框架，通过GPU加速实现高效的关节空间采样型模型预测控制（MPC），解决高维机械臂动态操作中的实时控制问题。 Mohak Bhardwaj,Balakumar Sundaralingam,Arsalan Mousavian,Nathan Ratliff,Dieter Fox,Fabio Ramos,Byron Boots cs.RO

authors_text: Adel Nikfarjam,Jakob Bossek,Aneta Neumann,Frank Neumann
title: Entropy-Based Evolutionary Diversity Optimisation for the Traveling Salesperson Problem
title_zh: 旅行商问题的基于熵的进化多样性优化
abstract: Computing diverse sets of high-quality solutions has gained increasing attention among the evolutionary computation community in recent years. It allows practitioners to choose from a set of high-quality alternatives. In this paper, we employ a population diversity measure, called the high-order entropy measure, in an evolutionary algorithm to compute a diverse set of high-quality solutions for the Traveling Salesperson Problem. In contrast to previous studies, our approach allows diversifying segments of tours containing several edges based on the entropy measure. We examine the resulting evolutionary diversity optimisation approach precisely in terms of the final set of solutions and theoretical properties. Experimental results show significant improvements compared to a recently proposed edge-based diversity optimisation approach when working with a large population of solutions or long segments.
summary: Computing diverse sets of high-quality solutions has gained increasing attention among the evolutionary computation community in recent years. It allows practitioners to choose from a set of high-quality alternatives. We examine the resulting evolutionary diversity optimisation approach precisely in terms of the final set of solutions and theoretical properties. Experimental results show significant improvements compared to a recently proposed edge-based diversity optimisation approach when working with a large population of solutions or long segments.
abstract_zh: 近年来，计算不同的高质量解决方案越来越受到进化计算社区的关注。它允许从业者从一组高质量的替代方案中进行选择。在本文中，我们在进化算法中采用了一种称为高阶熵度量的群体多样性度量来计算旅行商问题的一组多样化的高质量解决方案。与之前的研究相比，我们的方法允许基于熵度量使包含多个边缘的旅行片段多样化。我们根据最终的解决方案和理论属性精确地检查了由此产生的进化多样性优化方法。实验结果表明，与最近提出的基于边缘的多样性优化方法相比，在处理大量解决方案或长段时有显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高阶熵度量的进化多样性优化方法，用于解决旅行商问题，以生成多样化的高质量解集。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模解集或长路径段时存在局限性，需改进多样性优化策略以提升解的多样性和质量。
AI.method: 采用高阶熵度量评估种群多样性，通过优化路径段的多样性来增强解的多样性，与基于边的传统方法不同。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在处理大规模解集和长路径段时，相比现有边基方法，在多样性和解质量上有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在理论和实验上均证明了其有效性，为解决TSP问题提供了更优的多样性优化策略。

authors_text: Shixing Chen,Xiaohan Nie,David Fan,Dongqing Zhang,Vimal Bhat,Raffay Hamid
title: Shot Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning for Scene Boundary Detection
title_zh: 用于场景边界检测的镜头对比自监督学习
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2021
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2021
abstract: Scenes play a crucial role in breaking the storyline of movies and TV episodes into semantically cohesive parts. However, given their complex temporal structure, finding scene boundaries can be a challenging task requiring large amounts of labeled training data. To address this challenge, we present a self-supervised shot contrastive learning approach (ShotCoL) to learn a shot representation that maximizes the similarity between nearby shots compared to randomly selected shots. We show how to apply our learned shot representation for the task of scene boundary detection to offer state-of-the-art performance on the MovieNet dataset while requiring only ~25% of the training labels, using 9x fewer model parameters and offering 7x faster runtime. To assess the effectiveness of ShotCoL on novel applications of scene boundary detection, we take on the problem of finding timestamps in movies and TV episodes where video-ads can be inserted while offering a minimally disruptive viewing experience. To this end, we collected a new dataset called AdCuepoints with 3,975 movies and TV episodes, 2.2 million shots and 19,119 minimally disruptive ad cue-point labels. We present a thorough empirical analysis on this dataset demonstrating the effectiveness of ShotCoL for ad cue-points detection.

However, given their complex temporal structure, finding scene boundaries can be a challenging task requiring large amounts of labeled training data. To address this challenge, we present a self-supervised shot contrastive learning approach (ShotCoL) to learn a shot representation that maximizes the similarity between nearby shots compared to randomly selected shots. We show how to apply our learned shot representation for the task of scene boundary detection to offer state-of-the-art performance on the MovieNet dataset while requiring only ~25% of the training labels, using 9x fewer model parameters and offering 7x faster runtime. To assess the effectiveness of ShotCoL on novel applications of scene boundary detection, we take on the problem of finding timestamps in movies and TV episodes where video-ads can be inserted while offering a minimally disruptive viewing experience. To this end, we collected a new dataset called AdCuepoints with 3,975 movies and TV episodes, 2.2 million shots and 19,119 minimally disruptive ad cue-point labels. We present a thorough empirical analysis on this dataset demonstrating the effectiveness of ShotCoL for ad cue-points detection.
abstract_zh: 场景在将电影和电视剧的故事情节分解为语义上有凝聚力的部分方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，鉴于其复杂的时间结构，寻找场景边界可能是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要大量标记的训练数据。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种自监督镜头对比学习方法（ShotCoL）来学习镜头表示，与随机选择的镜头相比，最大化附近镜头之间的相似性。我们展示了如何将我们学习到的镜头表示应用于场景边界检测任务，以在 MovieNet 数据集上提供最先进的性能，同时仅需要约 25% 的训练标签，使用的模型参数减少了 9 倍，运行时间加快了 7 倍。为了评估 ShotCoL 在场景边界检测的新颖应用中的有效性，我们解决了在电影和电视剧中查找可以插入视频广告的时间戳的问题，同时提供破坏性最小的观看体验。为此，我们收集了一个名为 AdCuepoints 的新数据集，其中包含 3,975 部电影和电视剧、220 万个镜头和 19,119 个破坏性最小的广告提示点标签。我们对该数据集进行了全面的实证分析，证明了 ShotCoL 在广告提示点检测方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督学习方法ShotCoL，用于在电影和电视片段中检测场景边界，并应用于广告插入时间点的检测。
AI.motivation: 场景边界检测需要大量标注数据且计算复杂，现有方法效率低。为减少标注依赖并提升效率，需开发更高效的自监督学习框架。
AI.method: 设计ShotCoL方法，通过对比学习最大化相邻镜头的相似性，利用自监督学习降低标注需求，并构建包含3975部影视作品的AdCuepoints数据集验证方法。
AI.result: 在MovieNet数据集上以25%标注量达到SOTA性能，参数量减少9倍且运行速度提升7倍；AdCuepoints数据集验证了方法在广告插入点检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ShotCoL通过自监督对比学习显著降低了场景边界检测的标注依赖，同时在实际应用（如广告插入）中表现出色，为视频分析提供了高效解决方案。

We present a thorough empirical analysis on this dataset demonstrating the effectiveness of ShotCoL for ad cue-points detection. 场景在将电影和电视剧的故事情节分解为语义上有凝聚力的部分方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，鉴于其复杂的时间结构，寻找场景边界可能是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要大量标记的训练数据。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种自监督镜头对比学习方法（ShotCoL）来学习镜头表示，与随机选择的镜头相比，最大化附近镜头之间的相似性。我们展示了如何将我们学习到的镜头表示应用于场景边界检测任务，以在 MovieNet 数据集上提供最先进的性能，同时仅需要约 25% 的训练标签，使用的模型参数减少了 9 倍，运行时间加快了 7 倍。为了评估 ShotCoL 在场景边界检测的新颖应用中的有效性，我们解决了在电影和电视剧中查找可以插入视频广告的时间戳的问题，同时提供破坏性最小的观看体验。为此，我们收集了一个名为 AdCuepoints 的新数据集，其中包含 3,975 部电影和电视剧、220 万个镜头和 19,119 个破坏性最小的广告提示点标签。我们对该数据集进行了全面的实证分析，证明了 ShotCoL 在广告提示点检测方面的有效性。 本文提出一种自监督学习方法ShotCoL，用于在电影和电视片段中检测场景边界，并应用于广告插入时间点的检测。 Shixing Chen,Xiaohan Nie,David Fan,Dongqing Zhang,Vimal Bhat,Raffay Hamid cs.CV

authors_text: Ying Xin,Guanzhong Wang,Mingyuan Mao,Yuan Feng,Qingqing Dang,Yanjun Ma,Errui Ding,Shumin Han
title: PAFNet: An Efficient Anchor-Free Object Detector Guidance
title_zh: PAFNet：一种高效的无锚目标检测器指导
abstract: Object detection is a basic but challenging task in computer vision, which plays a key role in a variety of industrial applications. However, object detectors based on deep learning usually require greater storage requirements and longer inference time, which hinders its practicality seriously. Therefore, a trade-off between effectiveness and efficiency is necessary in practical scenarios. Considering that without constraint of pre-defined anchors, anchor-free detectors can achieve acceptable accuracy and inference speed simultaneously. In this paper, we start from an anchor-free detector called TTFNet, modify the structure of TTFNet and introduce multiple existing tricks to realize effective server and mobile solutions respectively. Since all experiments in this paper are conducted based on PaddlePaddle, we call the model as PAFNet(Paddle Anchor Free Network). For server side, PAFNet can achieve a better balance between effectiveness (42.2% mAP) and efficiency (67.15 FPS) on a single V100 GPU. For moblie side, PAFNet-lite can achieve a better accuracy of (23.9% mAP) and 26.00 ms on Kirin 990 ARM CPU, outperforming the existing state-of-the-art anchor-free detectors by significant margins. Source code is at https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleDetection.

abstract_zh: 目标检测是计算机视觉中一项基本但具有挑战性的任务，在各种工业应用中发挥着关键作用。然而，基于深度学习的目标检测器通常需要更大的存储需求和更长的推理时间，这严重阻碍了其实用性。因此，在实际场景中，需要在有效性和效率之间进行权衡。考虑到没有预定义锚点的约束，无锚点检测器可以同时达到可接受的精度和推理速度。在本文中，我们从称为 TTFNet 的无锚检测器开始，修改 TTFNet 的结构并引入多种现有技巧来分别实现有效的服务器和移动解决方案。由于本文所有实验均基于PaddlePaddle进行，因此我们将该模型称为PAFNet（Paddle Anchor Free Network）。对于服务器端，PAFNet 可以在单个 V100 GPU 上实现有效性（42.2% mAP）和效率（67.15 FPS）之间的更好平衡。对于移动端，PAFNet-lite 在 Kirin 990 ARM CPU 上可以实现更好的精度（23.9% mAP）和 26.00 毫秒，明显优于现有最先进的无锚检测器。源代码位于 https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleDetection。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PAFNet，一种高效的无锚框目标检测器，分别针对服务器和移动设备优化，以实现精度与效率的平衡。
AI.motivation: 基于深度学习的目标检测器通常需要较大的存储和较长的推理时间，限制了其实际应用。无锚框检测器无需预定义锚框，能在精度和速度间取得较好平衡，因此有必要对其进行优化以适应不同场景。
AI.method: 以无锚框检测器TTFNet为基础，修改其结构并引入现有优化技巧，分别设计服务器端（PAFNet）和移动端（PAFNet-lite）方案，基于PaddlePaddle框架实现。
AI.result: 在单块V100 GPU上，PAFNet达到42.2% mAP和67.15 FPS；在Kirin 990 ARM CPU上，PAFNet-lite达到23.9% mAP和26.00 ms推理时间，均优于现有无锚框检测器。
AI.conclusion: PAFNet通过结构改进和优化技巧，在服务器和移动端均实现了精度与效率的显著提升，为实际部署提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Ruojin Cai,Bharath Hariharan,Noah Snavely,Hadar Averbuch-Elor
title: Extreme Rotation Estimation using Dense Correlation Volumes
title_zh: 使用密集相关体积的极端旋转估计
comment: Published in CVPR 2021; Project page: https://ruojincai.github.io/ExtremeRotation/
comments: Published in CVPR 2021; Project page: https://ruojincai.github.io/ExtremeRotation/
abstract: We present a technique for estimating the relative 3D rotation of an RGB image pair in an extreme setting, where the images have little or no overlap. We observe that, even when images do not overlap, there may be rich hidden cues as to their geometric relationship, such as light source directions, vanishing points, and symmetries present in the scene. We propose a network design that can automatically learn such implicit cues by comparing all pairs of points between the two input images. Our method therefore constructs dense feature correlation volumes and processes these to predict relative 3D rotations. Our predictions are formed over a fine-grained discretization of rotations, bypassing difficulties associated with regressing 3D rotations. We demonstrate our approach on a large variety of extreme RGB image pairs, including indoor and outdoor images captured under different lighting conditions and geographic locations. Our evaluation shows that our model can successfully estimate relative rotations among non-overlapping images without compromising performance over overlapping image pairs.
summary: We present a technique for estimating the relative 3D rotation of an RGB image pair in an extreme setting, where the images have little or no overlap. We observe that, even when images do not overlap, there may be rich hidden cues as to their geometric relationship, such as light source directions, vanishing points, and symmetries present in the scene. We propose a network design that can automatically learn such implicit cues by comparing all pairs of points between the two input images. Our method therefore constructs dense feature correlation volumes and processes these to predict relative 3D rotations. Our predictions are formed over a fine-grained discretization of rotations, bypassing difficulties associated with regressing 3D rotations. We demonstrate our approach on a large variety of extreme RGB image pairs, including indoor and outdoor images captured under different lighting conditions and geographic locations. Our evaluation shows that our model can successfully estimate relative rotations among non-overlapping images without compromising performance over overlapping image pairs.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在极端设置下估计 RGB 图像对的相对 3D 旋转的技术，其中图像几乎没有重叠。我们观察到，即使图像不重叠，它们的几何关系也可能存在丰富的隐藏线索，例如场景中存在的光源方向、消失点和对称性。我们提出了一种网络设计，可以通过比较两个输入图像之间的所有点对来自动学习此类隐式线索。因此，我们的方法构建了密集的特征相关体积并对其进行处理以预测相对 3D 旋转。我们的预测是通过旋转的细粒度离散化形成的，绕过了与回归 3D 旋转相关的困难。我们在各种极端 RGB 图像对上展示了我们的方法，包括在不同照明条件和地理位置下捕获的室内和室外图像。我们的评估表明，我们的模型可以成功估计非重叠图像之间的相对旋转，而不会影响重叠图像对的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在图像无重叠情况下估计RGB图像对相对3D旋转的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖图像重叠区域估计旋转，但极端情况下图像可能无重叠，需利用隐藏几何线索（如光源方向、对称性）进行估计。
AI.method: 构建密集特征相关体，通过比较两图像所有点对自动学习隐含几何线索，并在离散化旋转空间中预测相对3D旋转。
AI.result: 在多种极端场景（室内外、不同光照/地理位置）的图像对上验证，模型在非重叠图像中成功估计旋转且性能不劣于重叠图像。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需图像重叠即可估计相对旋转，扩展了3D旋转估计的应用范围。

authors_text: Brian Okorn,Qiao Gu,Martial Hebert,David Held
title: ZePHyR: Zero-shot Pose Hypothesis Rating
title_zh: ZePHyR：零样本姿势假设评级
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Accepted to ICRA 2021. Brian and Qiao have equal contributions
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures. Accepted to ICRA 2021. Brian and Qiao have equal contributions
abstract: Pose estimation is a basic module in many robot manipulation pipelines. Estimating the pose of objects in the environment can be useful for grasping, motion planning, or manipulation. However, current state-of-the-art methods for pose estimation either rely on large annotated training sets or simulated data. Further, the long training times for these methods prohibit quick interaction with novel objects. To address these issues, we introduce a novel method for zero-shot object pose estimation in clutter. Our approach uses a hypothesis generation and scoring framework, with a focus on learning a scoring function that generalizes to objects not used for training. We achieve zero-shot generalization by rating hypotheses as a function of unordered point differences. We evaluate our method on challenging datasets with both textured and untextured objects in cluttered scenes and demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms previous methods on this task. We also demonstrate how our system can be used by quickly scanning and building a model of a novel object, which can immediately be used by our method for pose estimation. Our work allows users to estimate the pose of novel objects without requiring any retraining. Additional information can be found on our website https://bokorn.github.io/zephyr/

We achieve zero-shot generalization by rating hypotheses as a function of unordered point differences. We evaluate our method on challenging datasets with both textured and untextured objects in cluttered scenes and demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms previous methods on this task. Our work allows users to estimate the pose of novel objects without requiring any retraining. Additional information can be found on our website https://bokorn.github.io/zephyr/
abstract_zh: 位姿估计是许多机器人操纵流程中的基本模块。估计环境中物体的姿态对于抓取、运动规划或操纵非常有用。然而，当前最先进的姿态估计方法要么依赖于大型带注释的训练集，要么依赖于模拟数据。此外，这些方法的训练时间长，阻碍了与新物体的快速交互。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了一种杂波中零样本物体姿态估计的新方法。我们的方法使用假设生成和评分框架，重点是学习可推广到不用于训练的对象的评分函数。我们通过将假设评级为无序点差的函数来实现零样本泛化。我们在杂乱场景中具有纹理和无纹理对象的挑战性数据集上评估了我们的方法，并证明我们的方法在此任务上显着优于以前的方法。我们还演示了如何通过快速扫描和构建新物体的模型来使用我们的系统，该模型可以立即被我们的方法用于姿势估计。我们的工作允许用户估计新物体的姿势，而不需要任何重新训练。更多信息可以在我们的网站 https://bokorn.github.io/zephyr/ 上找到

authors_text: Brooke Krajancich,Petr Kellnhofer,Gordon Wetzstein
title: A Perceptual Model for Eccentricity-dependent Spatio-temporal Flicker Fusion and its Applications to Foveated Graphics
title_zh: 偏心率相关时空闪烁融合的感知模型及其在注视点图形中的应用
comment: ef:ACM Trans. Graph. 40, 4, Article 47 (August 2021), 11 pages
comments: ef:ACM Trans. Graph. 40, 4, Article 47 (August 2021), 11 pages
abstract: Virtual and augmented reality (VR/AR) displays strive to provide a resolution, framerate and field of view that matches the perceptual capabilities of the human visual system, all while constrained by limited compute budgets and transmission bandwidths of wearable computing systems. Foveated graphics techniques have emerged that could achieve these goals by exploiting the falloff of spatial acuity in the periphery of the visual field. However, considerably less attention has been given to temporal aspects of human vision, which also vary across the retina. This is in part due to limitations of current eccentricity-dependent models of the visual system. We introduce a new model, experimentally measuring and computationally fitting eccentricity-dependent critical flicker fusion thresholds jointly for both space and time. In this way, our model is unique in enabling the prediction of temporal information that is imperceptible for a certain spatial frequency, eccentricity, and range of luminance levels. We validate our model with an image quality user study, and use it to predict potential bandwidth savings 7x higher than those afforded by current spatial-only foveated models. As such, this work forms the enabling foundation for new temporally foveated graphics techniques.
summary: Virtual and augmented reality (VR/AR) displays strive to provide a resolution, framerate and field of view that matches the perceptual capabilities of the human visual system, all while constrained by limited compute budgets and transmission bandwidths of wearable computing systems. We introduce a new model, experimentally measuring and computationally fitting eccentricity-dependent critical flicker fusion thresholds jointly for both space and time. In this way, our model is unique in enabling the prediction of temporal information that is imperceptible for a certain spatial frequency, eccentricity, and range of luminance levels. We validate our model with an image quality user study, and use it to predict potential bandwidth savings 7x higher than those afforded by current spatial-only foveated models. As such, this work forms the enabling foundation for new temporally foveated graphics techniques.
abstract_zh: 虚拟和增强现实 (VR/AR) 显示器努力提供与人类视觉系统的感知能力相匹配的分辨率、帧速率和视野，同时受到可穿戴计算系统有限的计算预算和传输带宽的限制。已经出现的注视点图形技术可以通过利用视野外围空间敏锐度的衰减来实现这些目标。然而，人们对人类视觉时间方面的关注要少得多，因为人类视觉的时间方面在整个视网膜上也有所不同。这部分是由于当前视觉系统的偏心率相关模型的局限性。我们引入了一种新模型，通过实验测量和计算拟合空间和时间上与偏心率相关的临界闪烁融合阈值。通过这种方式，我们的模型在能够预测对于特定空间频率、偏心率和亮度水平范围来说难以察觉的时间信息方面是独一无二的。我们通过图像质量用户研究验证了我们的模型，并用它来预测潜在的带宽节省，比当前仅空间注视点模型所提供的带宽节省高出 7 倍。因此，这项工作为新的时间中心点图形技术奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合空间和时间因素的视网膜偏心率依赖性感知模型，用于优化VR/AR显示的视网膜图形渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有视网膜图形技术仅关注空间分辨率差异，忽视了人类视觉系统在时间感知上的偏心率差异，导致带宽利用率不足。
AI.method: 通过实验测量并建立空间-时间联合的临界闪烁融合阈值模型，结合计算拟合方法量化不同偏心率下的时空感知特性。
AI.result: 模型验证显示可实现比纯空间视网膜技术高7倍的带宽节省，且能预测特定空间频率下不可感知的时域信息。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为开发时空联合优化的视网膜图形技术提供了理论基础，显著提升VR/AR系统的资源利用效率。

authors_text: Umar Iqbal,Kevin Xie,Yunrong Guo,Jan Kautz,Pavlo Molchanov
title: KAMA: 3D Keypoint Aware Body Mesh Articulation
title_zh: KAMA：3D 关键点感知身体网格关节
comment: "Additional qualitative results: https://youtu.be/mPikZEIpUE0"
comments: "Additional qualitative results: https://youtu.be/mPikZEIpUE0"
abstract: We present KAMA, a 3D Keypoint Aware Mesh Articulation approach that allows us to estimate a human body mesh from the positions of 3D body keypoints. To this end, we learn to estimate 3D positions of 26 body keypoints and propose an analytical solution to articulate a parametric body model, SMPL, via a set of straightforward geometric transformations. Since keypoint estimation directly relies on image clues, our approach offers significantly better alignment to image content when compared to state-of-the-art approaches. Our proposed approach does not require any paired mesh annotations and is able to achieve state-of-the-art mesh fittings through 3D keypoint regression only. Results on the challenging 3DPW and Human3.6M demonstrate that our approach yields state-of-the-art body mesh fittings.
summary: We present KAMA, a 3D Keypoint Aware Mesh Articulation approach that allows us to estimate a human body mesh from the positions of 3D body keypoints. To this end, we learn to estimate 3D positions of 26 body keypoints and propose an analytical solution to articulate a parametric body model, SMPL, via a set of straightforward geometric transformations. Since keypoint estimation directly relies on image clues, our approach offers significantly better alignment to image content when compared to state-of-the-art approaches. Our proposed approach does not require any paired mesh annotations and is able to achieve state-of-the-art mesh fittings through 3D keypoint regression only. Results on the challenging 3DPW and Human3.6M demonstrate that our approach yields state-of-the-art body mesh fittings.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 KAMA，一种 3D 关键点感知网格关节方法，使我们能够根据 3D 身体关键点的位置来估计人体网格。为此，我们学习估计 26 个身体关键点的 3D 位置，并提出一种分析解决方案，通过一组简单的几何变换来阐明参数化身体模型 SMPL。由于关键点估计直接依赖于图像线索，因此与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法可以明显更好地对齐图像内容。我们提出的方法不需要任何配对网格注释，并且能够仅通过 3D 关键点回归来实现最先进的网格拟合。具有挑战性的 3DPW 和 Human3.6M 的结果表明，我们的方法产生了最先进的身体网格配件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KAMA方法，通过3D关键点估计实现人体网格的生成，无需配对网格标注。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖网格标注或难以与图像内容对齐，而关键点估计可直接利用图像线索提升对齐效果。
AI.method: 学习26个3D关键点位置，并通过几何变换解析式驱动SMPL参数化模型生成网格。
AI.result: 在3DPW和Human3.6M数据集上达到网格拟合的最先进水平，无需配对网格标注。
AI.conclusion: 仅通过3D关键点回归即可实现高精度人体网格拟合，验证了方法的有效性。

Since keypoint estimation directly relies on image clues, our approach offers significantly better alignment to image content when compared to state-of-the-art approaches. Our proposed approach does not require any paired mesh annotations and is able to achieve state-of-the-art mesh fittings through 3D keypoint regression only. Results on the challenging 3DPW and Human3.6M demonstrate that our approach yields state-of-the-art body mesh fittings. 我们提出了 KAMA，一种 3D 关键点感知网格关节方法，使我们能够根据 3D 身体关键点的位置来估计人体网格。为此，我们学习估计 26 个身体关键点的 3D 位置，并提出一种分析解决方案，通过一组简单的几何变换来阐明参数化身体模型 SMPL。由于关键点估计直接依赖于图像线索，因此与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法可以明显更好地对齐图像内容。我们提出的方法不需要任何配对网格注释，并且能够仅通过 3D 关键点回归来实现最先进的网格拟合。具有挑战性的 3DPW 和 Human3.6M 的结果表明，我们的方法产生了最先进的身体网格配件。 本文提出KAMA方法，通过3D关键点估计实现人体网格的生成，无需配对网格标注。 Umar Iqbal,Kevin Xie,Yunrong Guo,Jan Kautz,Pavlo Molchanov cs.CV

authors_text: Haotian Yan,Zhe Li,Weijian Li,Changhu Wang,Ming Wu,Chuang Zhang
title: ConTNet: Why not use convolution and transformer at the same time?
title_zh: 内容：为什么不同时使用卷积和变换器？
abstract: Although convolutional networks (ConvNets) have enjoyed great success in computer vision (CV), it suffers from capturing global information crucial to dense prediction tasks such as object detection and segmentation. In this work, we innovatively propose ConTNet (ConvolutionTransformer Network), combining transformer with ConvNet architectures to provide large receptive fields. Unlike the recently-proposed transformer-based models (e.g., ViT, DeiT) that are sensitive to hyper-parameters and extremely dependent on a pile of data augmentations when trained from scratch on a midsize dataset (e.g., ImageNet1k), ConTNet can be optimized like normal ConvNets (e.g., ResNet) and preserve an outstanding robustness. It is also worth pointing that, given identical strong data augmentations, the performance improvement of ConTNet is more remarkable than that of ResNet. We present its superiority and effectiveness on image classification and downstream tasks. For example, our ConTNet achieves 81.8% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet which is the same as DeiT-B with less than 40% computational complexity. ConTNet-M also outperforms ResNet50 as the backbone of both Faster-RCNN (by 2.6%) and Mask-RCNN (by 3.2%) on COCO2017 dataset. We hope that ConTNet could serve as a useful backbone for CV tasks and bring new ideas for model design

abstract_zh: 尽管卷积网络（ConvNet）在计算机视觉（CV）领域取得了巨大成功，但它在捕获对于密集预测任务（例如对象检测和分割）至关重要的全局信息方面遇到了困难。在这项工作中，我们创新性地提出了ConTNet（ConvolutionTransformer Network），将Transformer与ConvNet架构相结合以提供大的感受野。与最近提出的基于 Transformer 的模型（例如 ViT、DeiT）不同，这些模型对超参数敏感，并且在中型数据集（例如 ImageNet1k）上从头开始训练时极度依赖于一堆数据增强，ConTNet 可以像普通 ConvNet（例如 ResNet）一样进行优化，并保持出色的鲁棒性。还值得指出的是，在相同的强数据增强的情况下，ConTNet 的性能提升比 ResNet 更为显着。我们展示了它在图像分类和下游任务上的优越性和有效性。例如，我们的 ConTNet 在 ImageNet 上实现了 81.8% 的 top-1 准确率，与 DeiT-B 相同，但计算复杂度低于 40%。在 COCO2017 数据集上，作为 Faster-RCNN（提高 2.6%）和 Mask-RCNN（提高 3.2%）的骨干，ConTNet-M 的性能也优于 ResNet50。我们希望 ConTNet 能够成为 CV 任务的有用骨干网，并为模型设计带来新的思路

AI.tldr: 提出ConTNet，结合卷积和Transformer架构，提升图像分类和下游任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 解决卷积网络全局信息捕捉不足问题，同时克服现有Transformer模型对数据增强和超参数的依赖。
AI.method: 设计ConTNet架构，融合卷积和Transformer模块，优化策略类似ResNet，减少对数据增强的依赖。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上达到81.8%准确率，计算复杂度低于DeiT-B；在COCO2017上作为骨干网络优于ResNet50。
AI.conclusion: ConTNet为CV任务提供高效骨干网络，结合卷积和Transformer优势，具有应用潜力。

authors_text: Mahmoud Hossam,Trung Le,Michael Papasimeon,Viet Huynh,Dinh Phung
title: Text Generation with Deep Variational GAN
title_zh: 使用深度变分 GAN 生成文本
comment: Accepted in the Third Workshop on Bayesian Deep Learning (NIPS / NeurIPS 2018)
comments: Accepted in the Third Workshop on Bayesian Deep Learning (NIPS / NeurIPS 2018)
abstract: Generating realistic sequences is a central task in many machine learning applications. There has been considerable recent progress on building deep generative models for sequence generation tasks. However, the issue of mode-collapsing remains a main issue for the current models. In this paper we propose a GAN-based generic framework to address the problem of mode-collapse in a principled approach. We change the standard GAN objective to maximize a variational lower-bound of the log-likelihood while minimizing the Jensen-Shanon divergence between data and model distributions. We experiment our model with text generation task and show that it can generate realistic text with high diversity.
summary: Generating realistic sequences is a central task in many machine learning applications. There has been considerable recent progress on building deep generative models for sequence generation tasks. However, the issue of mode-collapsing remains a main issue for the current models. In this paper we propose a GAN-based generic framework to address the problem of mode-collapse in a principled approach. We change the standard GAN objective to maximize a variational lower-bound of the log-likelihood while minimizing the Jensen-Shanon divergence between data and model distributions. We experiment our model with text generation task and show that it can generate realistic text with high diversity.
abstract_zh: 生成真实序列是许多机器学习应用程序的核心任务。最近在为序列生成任务构建深度生成模型方面取得了相当大的进展。然而，模式崩溃问题仍然是当前模型的主要问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 GAN 的通用框架，以原则性的方法解决模式崩溃问题。我们更改了标准 GAN 目标，以最大化对数似然的变分下界，同时最小化数据和模型分布之间的 Jensen-Shanon 散度。我们用文本生成任务对我们的模型进行了实验，并表明它可以生成具有高度多样性的真实文本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度变分GAN的框架，通过改进目标函数解决文本生成中的模式崩溃问题。
AI.motivation: 当前生成模型在文本生成任务中普遍存在模式崩溃问题，导致生成结果多样性不足。
AI.method: 将标准GAN目标函数修改为最大化变分下界同时最小化数据分布与模型分布的Jensen-Shannon散度。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型能生成具有高多样性的真实文本，有效缓解了模式崩溃问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出的变分GAN框架为解决生成模型模式崩溃问题提供了有效方法，提升了文本生成质量。

authors_text: Youshan Zhang,Brian D. Davison
title: Efficient Pre-trained Features and Recurrent Pseudo-Labeling in Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 无监督域适应中的高效预训练特征和循环伪标记
abstract: Domain adaptation (DA) mitigates the domain shift problem when transferring knowledge from one annotated domain to another similar but different unlabeled domain. However, existing models often utilize one of the ImageNet models as the backbone without exploring others, and fine-tuning or retraining the backbone ImageNet model is also time-consuming. Moreover, pseudo-labeling has been used to improve the performance in the target domain, while how to generate confident pseudo labels and explicitly align domain distributions has not been well addressed. In this paper, we show how to efficiently opt for the best pre-trained features from seventeen well-known ImageNet models in unsupervised DA problems. In addition, we propose a recurrent pseudo-labeling model using the best pre-trained features (termed PRPL) to improve classification performance. To show the effectiveness of PRPL, we evaluate it on three benchmark datasets, Office+Caltech-10, Office-31, and Office-Home. Extensive experiments show that our model reduces computation time and boosts the mean accuracy to 98.1%, 92.4%, and 81.2%, respectively, substantially outperforming the state of the art.
summary: Domain adaptation (DA) mitigates the domain shift problem when transferring knowledge from one annotated domain to another similar but different unlabeled domain. However, existing models often utilize one of the ImageNet models as the backbone without exploring others, and fine-tuning or retraining the backbone ImageNet model is also time-consuming. Moreover, pseudo-labeling has been used to improve the performance in the target domain, while how to generate confident pseudo labels and explicitly align domain distributions has not been well addressed. In this paper, we show how to efficiently opt for the best pre-trained features from seventeen well-known ImageNet models in unsupervised DA problems. In addition, we propose a recurrent pseudo-labeling model using the best pre-trained features (termed PRPL) to improve classification performance. To show the effectiveness of PRPL, we evaluate it on three benchmark datasets, Office+Caltech-10, Office-31, and Office-Home. Extensive experiments show that our model reduces computation time and boosts the mean accuracy to 98.1%, 92.4%, and 81.2%, respectively, substantially outperforming the state of the art.
abstract_zh: 将知识从一个带注释的域转移到另一个相似但不同的未标记域时，域适应 (DA) 可以缓解域转移问题。然而，现有模型通常利用其中一个 ImageNet 模型作为主干，而不探索其他模型，并且对主干 ImageNet 模型进行微调或重新训练也非常耗时。此外，伪标签已被用来提高目标域的性能，而如何生成置信的伪标签并显式对齐域分布尚未得到很好的解决。在本文中，我们展示了如何在无监督 DA 问题中从 17 个著名的 ImageNet 模型中有效地选择最佳的预训练特征。此外，我们提出了一种使用最佳预训练特征（称为 PRPL）的循环伪标记模型来提高分类性能。为了展示 PRPL 的有效性，我们在三个基准数据集 Office+Caltech-10、Office-31 和 Office-Home 上对其进行了评估。大量实验表明，我们的模型减少了计算时间，并将平均准确度分别提高到 98.1%、92.4% 和 81.2%，大大优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究无监督领域自适应中的高效预训练特征选择和递归伪标签方法，以提升目标域分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖单一ImageNet模型导致计算耗时，且伪标签生成与领域分布对齐问题未被充分解决。
AI.method: 从17个ImageNet模型中选择最优预训练特征，并提出递归伪标签模型PRPL以提升分类效果。
AI.result: 在Office+Caltech-10、Office-31和Office-Home数据集上分别达到98.1%、92.4%和81.2%的准确率，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: PRPL方法通过高效特征选择和递归伪标签机制，在无监督领域自适应任务中取得显著性能提升。

search_text: Efficient Pre-trained Features and Recurrent Pseudo-Labeling in Unsupervised Domain Adaptation 无监督域适应中的高效预训练特征和循环伪标记 Domain adaptation (DA) mitigates the domain shift problem when transferring knowledge from one annotated domain to another similar but different unlabeled domain. However, existing models often utilize one of the ImageNet models as the backbone without exploring others, and fine-tuning or retraining the backbone ImageNet model is also time-consuming. Moreover, pseudo-labeling has been used to improve the performance in the target domain, while how to generate confident pseudo labels and explicitly align domain distributions has not been well addressed. In this paper, we show how to efficiently opt for the best pre-trained features from seventeen well-known ImageNet models in unsupervised DA problems. In addition, we propose a recurrent pseudo-labeling model using the best pre-trained features (termed PRPL) to improve classification performance. To show the effectiveness of PRPL, we evaluate it on three benchmark datasets, Office+Caltech-10, Office-31, and Office-Home. Extensive experiments show that our model reduces computation time and boosts the mean accuracy to 98.1%, 92.4%, and 81.2%, respectively, substantially outperforming the state of the art. 将知识从一个带注释的域转移到另一个相似但不同的未标记域时，域适应 (DA) 可以缓解域转移问题。然而，现有模型通常利用其中一个 ImageNet 模型作为主干，而不探索其他模型，并且对主干 ImageNet 模型进行微调或重新训练也非常耗时。此外，伪标签已被用来提高目标域的性能，而如何生成置信的伪标签并显式对齐域分布尚未得到很好的解决。在本文中，我们展示了如何在无监督 DA 问题中从 17 个著名的 ImageNet 模型中有效地选择最佳的预训练特征。此外，我们提出了一种使用最佳预训练特征（称为 PRPL）的循环伪标记模型来提高分类性能。为了展示 PRPL 的有效性，我们在三个基准数据集 Office+Caltech-10、Office-31 和 Office-Home 上对其进行了评估。大量实验表明，我们的模型减少了计算时间，并将平均准确度分别提高到 98.1%、92.4% 和 81.2%，大大优于现有技术。 本文研究无监督领域自适应中的高效预训练特征选择和递归伪标签方法，以提升目标域分类性能。 Youshan Zhang,Brian D. authors_text: Mahmoud Hossam,Trung Le,He Zhao,Viet Huynh,Dinh Phung
title: Improved and Efficient Text Adversarial Attacks using Target Information
title_zh: 使用目标信息改进且高效的文本对抗攻击
comment: Accepted in the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) workshop on Robust and Reliable Machine Learning in the Real World (RobustML)
comments: Accepted in the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) workshop on Robust and Reliable Machine Learning in the Real World (RobustML)
abstract: There has been recently a growing interest in studying adversarial examples on natural language models in the black-box setting. These methods attack natural language classifiers by perturbing certain important words until the classifier label is changed. In order to find these important words, these methods rank all words by importance by querying the target model word by word for each input sentence, resulting in high query inefficiency. A new interesting approach was introduced that addresses this problem through interpretable learning to learn the word ranking instead of previous expensive search. The main advantage of using this approach is that it achieves comparable attack rates to the state-of-the-art methods, yet faster and with fewer queries, where fewer queries are desirable to avoid suspicion towards the attacking agent. Nonetheless, this approach sacrificed the useful information that could be leveraged from the target classifier for that sake of query efficiency. In this paper we study the effect of leveraging the target model outputs and data on both attack rates and average number of queries, and we show that both can be improved, with a limited overhead of additional queries.

abstract_zh: 最近，人们对研究黑盒环境中自然语言模型的对抗性示例越来越感兴趣。这些方法通过扰乱某些重要单词直到分类器标签发生变化来攻击自然语言分类器。为了找到这些重要的单词，这些方法通过对每个输入句子逐字查询目标模型来按重要性对所有单词进行排序，导致查询效率很高。引入了一种新的有趣方法，通过可解释的学习来解决这个问题，以学习单词排名，而不是以前昂贵的搜索。使用这种方法的主要优点是，它实现了与最先进的方法相当的攻击率，但速度更快且查询更少，其中需要更少的查询以避免对攻击代理的怀疑。尽管如此，这种方法牺牲了可以从目标分类器中利用的有用信息，以提高查询效率。在本文中，我们研究了利用目标模型输出和数据对攻击率和平均查询数的影响，并且我们表明，在额外查询的开销有限的情况下，两者都可以得到改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用目标模型信息改进文本对抗攻击的方法，在提升攻击成功率的同时减少查询次数。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法因逐字查询目标模型导致效率低下，而新方法虽提升效率却牺牲了目标信息利用，需探索兼顾效率与效果的改进方案。
AI.method: 通过结合可解释学习与目标模型输出数据，优化词重要性排序机制，减少冗余查询并提升攻击效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持较高攻击成功率的同时，平均查询次数显著减少，额外查询开销可控。
AI.conclusion: 利用目标模型信息可有效提升对抗攻击性能，为黑盒场景下的高效攻击提供新思路。

authors_text: Sorena Sarmadi,James J. Winkle,Razan N. Alnahhas,Matthew R. Bennett,Krešimir Josić,Andreas Mang,Robert Azencott
title: Stochastic Neural Networks for Automatic Cell Tracking in Microscopy Image Sequences of Bacterial Colonies
title_zh: 用于细菌菌落显微镜图像序列中自动细胞跟踪的随机神经网络
comment: 35 pages, 8 figures, 7 tables
comments: 35 pages, 8 figures, 7 tables
abstract: Our work targets automated analysis to quantify the growth dynamics of a population of bacilliform bacteria. We propose an innovative approach to frame-sequence tracking of deformable-cell motion by the automated minimization of a new, specific cost functional. This minimization is implemented by dedicated Boltzmann machines (stochastic recurrent neural networks). Automated detection of cell divisions is handled similarly by successive minimizations of two cost functions, alternating the identification of children pairs and parent identification. We validate the proposed automatic cell tracking algorithm using (i) recordings of simulated cell colonies that closely mimic the growth dynamics of E. coli in microfluidic traps and (ii) real data. On a batch of 1100 simulated image frames, cell registration accuracies per frame ranged from 94.5% to 100%, with a high average. Our initial tests using experimental image sequences (i.e., real data) of E. coli colonies also yield convincing results, with a registration accuracy ranging from 90% to 100%.
summary: Our work targets automated analysis to quantify the growth dynamics of a population of bacilliform bacteria. abstract_zh: 我们的工作目标是通过自动化分析来量化杆状细菌群体的生长动态。我们提出了一种创新方法，通过自动最小化新的特定成本函数来对可变形细胞运动进行帧序列跟踪。这种最小化是由专用玻尔兹曼机（随机循环神经网络）实现的。细胞分裂的自动检测的处理方式类似，通过连续最小化两个成本函数，交替识别子代对和父代识别。我们使用（i）模拟细胞集落的记录和（ii）真实数据来验证所提出的自动细胞跟踪算法，该模拟细胞集落密切模仿微流体陷阱中大肠杆菌的生长动态。在一批 1100 个模拟图像帧上，每帧的细胞配准精度在 94.5% 到 100% 之间，平均水平较高。我们使用大肠杆菌菌落的实验图像序列（即真实数据）进行的初步测试也产生了令人信服的结果，配准精度范围为 90% 至 100%。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于随机神经网络的自动细胞追踪方法，用于显微镜图像序列中细菌菌落的生长动态量化分析。
AI.motivation: 传统手动分析细菌生长动态效率低且易出错，需开发自动化方法以准确追踪细胞运动并检测分裂事件。
AI.method: 设计专用玻尔兹曼机（随机递归神经网络）通过最小化特定成本函数实现帧序列追踪，采用交替优化策略处理细胞分裂检测。
AI.result: 在1100帧模拟图像中追踪准确率达94.5%-100%，真实E. coli数据集结果为90%-100%，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为细菌群体生长动态研究提供了高精度自动化分析工具，具有处理复杂显微图像序列的潜力。

title: Geometric Deep Learning: Grids, Groups, Graphs, Geodesics, and Gauges
title_zh: 几何深度学习：网格、组、图形、测地线和仪表
comment: 156 pages. Work in progress -- comments welcome!
comments: 156 pages. Work in progress -- comments welcome!
abstract: The last decade has witnessed an experimental revolution in data science and machine learning, epitomised by deep learning methods. Indeed, many high-dimensional learning tasks previously thought to be beyond reach -- such as computer vision, playing Go, or protein folding -- are in fact feasible with appropriate computational scale. Remarkably, the essence of deep learning is built from two simple algorithmic principles: first, the notion of representation or feature learning, whereby adapted, often hierarchical, features capture the appropriate notion of regularity for each task, and second, learning by local gradient-descent type methods, typically implemented as backpropagation. While learning generic functions in high dimensions is a cursed estimation problem, most tasks of interest are not generic, and come with essential pre-defined regularities arising from the underlying low-dimensionality and structure of the physical world. This text is concerned with exposing these regularities through unified geometric principles that can be applied throughout a wide spectrum of applications. Such a 'geometric unification' endeavour, in the spirit of Felix Klein's Erlangen Program, serves a dual purpose: on one hand, it provides a common mathematical framework to study the most successful neural network architectures, such as CNNs, RNNs, GNNs, and Transformers. On the other hand, it gives a constructive procedure to incorporate prior physical knowledge into neural architectures and provide principled way to build future architectures yet to be invented.
summary: The last decade has witnessed an experimental revolution in data science and machine learning, epitomised by deep learning methods. Indeed, many high-dimensional learning tasks previously thought to be beyond reach -- such as computer vision, playing Go, or protein folding -- are in fact feasible with appropriate computational scale. Remarkably, the essence of deep learning is built from two simple algorithmic principles: first, the notion of representation or feature learning, whereby adapted, often hierarchical, features capture the appropriate notion of regularity for each task, and second, learning by local gradient-descent type methods, typically implemented as backpropagation. Such a 'geometric unification' endeavour, in the spirit of Felix Klein's Erlangen Program, serves a dual purpose: on one hand, it provides a common mathematical framework to study the most successful neural network architectures, such as CNNs, RNNs, GNNs, and Transformers. On the other hand, it gives a constructive procedure to incorporate prior physical knowledge into neural architectures and provide principled way to build future architectures yet to be invented.
abstract_zh: 过去十年见证了数据科学和机器学习领域的实验革命，以深度学习方法为代表。事实上，许多以前被认为遥不可及的高维学习任务——例如计算机视觉、围棋或蛋白质折叠——实际上在适当的计算规模下是可行的。值得注意的是，深度学习的本质是基于两个简单的算法原理构建的：首先，表示或特征学习的概念，通过调整，通常是分层的，特征捕获每个任务的适当的规律性概念；其次，通过局部梯度下降类型的方法进行学习，通常以反向传播的形式实现。虽然学习高维度的通用函数是一个被诅咒的估计问题，但大多数感兴趣的任务都不是通用的，并且具有由物理世界的底层低维和结构产生的基本预定义规律。本文致力于通过统一的几何原理揭示这些规律，这些原理可以应用于广泛的应用。这种“几何统一”的努力，本着 Felix Klein 的埃尔兰根计划的精神，具有双重目的：一方面，它提供了一个通用的数学框架来研究最成功的神经网络架构，例如 CNN、RNN、GNN 和 Transformer。另一方面，它提供了一个建设性的程序，将先前的物理知识融入到神经架构中，并提供构建尚未发明的未来架构的原则性方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过统一的几何原理，将深度学习方法与物理世界的低维结构和规律相结合，构建适用于多种神经网络架构的数学框架。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习在处理高维数据时面临维度灾难，而现实任务中存在大量先验物理规律未被有效利用，需通过几何方法整合这些结构化信息。
AI.method: 基于费利克斯·克莱因的埃尔朗根纲领，提出几何深度学习框架，通过网格、群论、图结构、测地线和规范理论等几何概念统一分析CNN、RNN、GNN等架构。
AI.result: 建立了神经网络架构的几何分类体系，并提供了将物理先验知识嵌入模型的数学方法，为新型网络设计提供理论指导。
AI.conclusion: 几何深度学习通过抽象几何原理，实现了对现有网络架构的数学统一，并为未来结合物理规律的模型创新提供了系统性方法论。

title: TRECVID 2020: A comprehensive campaign for evaluating video retrieval tasks across multiple application domains
title_zh: TRECVID 2020：评估跨多个应用领域的视频检索任务的综合活动
comment: TRECVID 2020 Workshop Overview Paper. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.09984
comments: TRECVID 2020 Workshop Overview Paper. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.09984
abstract: The TREC Video Retrieval Evaluation (TRECVID) is a TREC-style video analysis and retrieval evaluation with the goal of promoting progress in research and development of content-based exploitation and retrieval of information from digital video via open, metrics-based evaluation. Over the last twenty years this effort has yielded a better understanding of how systems can effectively accomplish such processing and how one can reliably benchmark their performance. TRECVID has been funded by NIST (National Institute of Standards and Technology) and other US government agencies. In addition, many organizations and individuals worldwide contribute significant time and effort. TRECVID 2020 represented a continuation of four tasks and the addition of two new tasks. In total, 29 teams from various research organizations worldwide completed one or more of the following six tasks: 1. Ad-hoc Video Search (AVS), 2. Instance Search (INS), 3. Disaster Scene Description and Indexing (DSDI), 4. Video to Text Description (VTT), 5. Activities in Extended Video (ActEV), 6. Video Summarization (VSUM). This paper is an introduction to the evaluation framework, tasks, data, and measures used in the evaluation campaign.

abstract_zh: TREC 视频检索评估 (TRECVID) 是一种 TREC 风格的视频分析和检索评估，旨在通过开放的、基于指标的评估，促进基于内容的开发和数字视频信息检索的研究和开发进展。在过去的二十年中，这项工作使人们更好地了解了系统如何有效地完成此类处理以及如何可靠地对其性能进行基准测试。 TRECVID 得到了 NIST（美国国家标准与技术研究所）和其他美国政府机构的资助。此外，世界各地的许多组织和个人也贡献了大量的时间和精力。 TRECVID 2020 代表了四项任务的延续和两项新任务的增加。来自全球不同研究组织的 29 个团队总共完成了以下六项任务中的一项或多项：1. 即席视频搜索 (AVS)、2. 实例搜索 (INS)、3. 灾难场景描述和索引 (DSDI)、4. 视频到文本描述 (VTT)、5. 扩展视频活动 (ActEV)、6. 视频摘要 (VSUM)。本文介绍了评估活动的评估框架、任务、数据和措施。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了TRECVID 2020评估框架，涵盖六个视频检索任务及对应的数据和评估指标。
AI.motivation: 通过标准化评估推动视频检索技术发展，促进跨领域研究与技术验证。
AI.method: 组织全球研究团队参与六大任务，采用公开数据集和统一指标进行多维度性能评估。
AI.result: 29支团队完成六项任务，包括视频搜索、灾难场景描述、视频摘要等，验证了不同技术方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TRECVID 2020通过多任务评估推动了视频检索领域技术进步，并为未来研究提供了基准参考。

authors_text: Aviv Keren
title: The Role of General Intelligence in Mathematical Reasoning
title_zh: 一般智力在数学推理中的作用
comment: ef:1st Mathematical Reasoning in General Artificial Intelligence Workshop, ICLR 2021
comments: ef:1st Mathematical Reasoning in General Artificial Intelligence Workshop, ICLR 2021
abstract: Objects are a centerpiece of the mathematical realm and our interaction with and reasoning about it, just as they are of the physical one (if not more). And humans' mathematical reasoning must ultimately be grounded in our general intelligence. Yet in contemporary cognitive science and A.I., the physical and mathematical domains are customarily explored separately, which allows for baking in assumptions for what objects are for the system - and missing potential connections. In this paper, I put the issue into its philosophical and cognitive context. I then describe an abstract theoretical framework for learning object representations, that makes room for mathematical objects on par with non-mathematical ones. Finally, I describe a case study that builds on that view to show how our general ability for integrating different aspects of objects effects our conception of the natural numbers.
summary: Objects are a centerpiece of the mathematical realm and our interaction with and reasoning about it, just as they are of the physical one (if not more). And humans' mathematical reasoning must ultimately be grounded in our general intelligence. Finally, I describe a case study that builds on that view to show how our general ability for integrating different aspects of objects effects our conception of the natural numbers.
abstract_zh: 对象是数学领域以及我们与它的交互和推理的核心，就像它们是物理领域的核心一样（如果不是更多的话）。人类的数学推理最终必须以我们的一般智力为基础。然而，在当代认知科学和人工智能中，物理和数学领域通常是分开探索的，这允许对系统中的对象进行假设，并忽略潜在的联系。在本文中，我将这个问题置于其哲学和认知背景中。然后，我描述了一个用于学习对象表示的抽象理论框架，该框架为数学对象与非数学对象提供了同等的空间。最后，我描述了一个基于该观点的案例研究，以展示我们整合对象不同方面的一般能力如何影响我们对自然数的概念。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了通用智能在数学推理中的作用，提出将数学与物理领域对象统一的理论框架。
AI.motivation: 当前认知科学与AI将物理和数学领域割裂研究，导致对象定义的假设固化，忽略了潜在联系。

search_text: The Role of General Intelligence in Mathematical Reasoning 一般智力在数学推理中的作用 Objects are a centerpiece of the mathematical realm and our interaction with and reasoning about it, just as they are of the physical one (if not more). And humans' mathematical reasoning must ultimately be grounded in our general intelligence. Yet in contemporary cognitive science and A.I., the physical and mathematical domains are customarily explored separately, which allows for baking in assumptions for what objects are for the system - and missing potential connections. In this paper, I put the issue into its philosophical and cognitive context. I then describe an abstract theoretical framework for learning object representations, that makes room for mathematical objects on par with non-mathematical ones. Finally, I describe a case study that builds on that view to show how our general ability for integrating different aspects of objects effects our conception of the natural numbers. 对象是数学领域以及我们与它的交互和推理的核心，就像它们是物理领域的核心一样（如果不是更多的话）。人类的数学推理最终必须以我们的一般智力为基础。然而，在当代认知科学和人工智能中，物理和数学领域通常是分开探索的，这允许对系统中的对象进行假设，并忽略潜在的联系。在本文中，我将这个问题置于其哲学和认知背景中。然后，我描述了一个用于学习对象表示的抽象理论框架，该框架为数学对象与非数学对象提供了同等的空间。最后，我描述了一个基于该观点的案例研究，以展示我们整合对象不同方面的一般能力如何影响我们对自然数的概念。 本文探讨了通用智能在数学推理中的作用，提出将数学与物理领域对象统一的理论框架。 Aviv Keren cs.AI,cs.LG,math.HO

authors_text: Tianyu Wang,Shi-Yuan Ma,Logan G. Wright,Tatsuhiro Onodera,Brian Richard,Peter L. McMahon
title: An optical neural network using less than 1 photon per multiplication
title_zh: 每次乘法使用少于 1 个光子的光学神经网络
comment: 42 pages, 21 figures
comments: 42 pages, 21 figures
abstract: Deep learning has rapidly become a widespread tool in both scientific and commercial endeavors. Milestones of deep learning exceeding human performance have been achieved for a growing number of tasks over the past several years, across areas as diverse as game-playing, natural-language translation, and medical-image analysis. However, continued progress is increasingly hampered by the high energy costs associated with training and running deep neural networks on electronic processors. Optical neural networks have attracted attention as an alternative physical platform for deep learning, as it has been theoretically predicted that they can fundamentally achieve higher energy efficiency than neural networks deployed on conventional digital computers. Here, we experimentally demonstrate an optical neural network achieving 99% accuracy on handwritten-digit classification using ~3.2 detected photons per weight multiplication and ~90% accuracy using ~0.64 photons (~$2.4 \times 10^{-19}$ J of optical energy) per weight multiplication. This performance was achieved using a custom free-space optical processor that executes matrix-vector multiplications in a massively parallel fashion, with up to ~0.5 million scalar (weight) multiplications performed at the same time. Using commercially available optical components and standard neural-network training methods, we demonstrated that optical neural networks can operate near the standard quantum limit with extremely low optical powers and still achieve high accuracy. Our results provide a proof-of-principle for low-optical-power operation, and with careful system design including the surrounding electronics used for data storage and control, open up a path to realizing optical processors that require only $10^{-16}$ J total energy per scalar multiplication -- which is orders of magnitude more efficient than current digital processors.

abstract_zh: 深度学习已迅速成为科学和商业领域的广泛工具。过去几年里，越来越多的任务实现了深度学习超越人类表现的里程碑，涉及游戏、自然语言翻译和医学图像分析等多种领域。然而，在电子处理器上训练和运行深度神经网络所需的高能源成本日益阻碍了持续进展。光神经网络作为深度学习的替代物理平台引起了人们的关注，因为理论上预测它们可以从根本上实现比传统数字计算机上部署的神经网络更高的能源效率。在这里，我们通过实验证明了一种光学神经网络，使用每次权重乘法约 3.2 个检测到的光子，实现了 99% 的手写数字分类准确率；使用每次权重乘法约 0.64 个光子（约 2.4 美元 × 10^{-19}$ J 光能），准确率达到 90% 左右。这一性能是通过使用定制的自由空间光学处理器实现的，该处理器以大规模并行方式执行矩阵向量乘法，同时执行多达约 50 万个标量（权重）乘法。使用商用光学组件和标准神经网络训练方法，我们证明光学神经网络可以以极低的光功率在标准量子极限附近运行，并且仍然实现高精度。我们的研究结果为低光功率操作提供了原理验证，并且通过仔细的系统设计（包括用于数据存储和控制的周围电子设备），开辟了一条实现每次标量乘法仅需要 $10^{-16}$ J 总能量的光学处理器的途径，这比当前的数字处理器效率高几个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用少于1个光子进行乘法运算的光学神经网络，实现了高精度的手写数字分类。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在科学和商业领域广泛应用，但电子处理器的高能耗限制了其进一步发展。光学神经网络因其理论上的高能效潜力成为替代方案。
AI.method: 采用定制的自由空间光学处理器，通过并行执行矩阵-向量乘法实现大规模运算，使用商用光学元件和标准训练方法。
AI.result: 在手写数字分类任务中，使用约3.2个检测光子/乘法达到99%准确率，使用0.64个光子/乘法（2.4×10⁻¹⁹ J）达到90%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 证明了光学处理器可在极低光功率下运行并保持高精度，为实现每标量乘法仅需10⁻¹⁶ J能量的光学处理器提供了可行性路径。

authors_text: Andrey Moskalenko,Mikhail Erofeev,Dmitriy Vatolin
title: Deep Two-Stage High-Resolution Image Inpainting
title_zh: 深度两阶段高分辨率图像修复
abstract: In recent years, the field of image inpainting has developed rapidly, learning based approaches show impressive results in the task of filling missing parts in an image. But most deep methods are strongly tied to the resolution of the images on which they were trained. A slight resolution increase leads to serious artifacts and unsatisfactory filling quality. These methods are therefore unsuitable for interactive image processing. In this article, we propose a method that solves the problem of inpainting arbitrary-size images. We also describe a way to better restore texture fragments in the filled area. For this, we propose to use information from neighboring pixels by shifting the original image in four directions. Moreover, this approach can work with existing inpainting models, making them almost resolution independent without the need for retraining. We also created a GIMP plugin that implements our technique. The plugin, code, and model weights are available at https://github.com/a-mos/High_Resolution_Image_Inpainting.
summary: In recent years, the field of image inpainting has developed rapidly, learning based approaches show impressive results in the task of filling missing parts in an image. But most deep methods are strongly tied to the resolution of the images on which they were trained. A slight resolution increase leads to serious artifacts and unsatisfactory filling quality. We also describe a way to better restore texture fragments in the filled area. For this, we propose to use information from neighboring pixels by shifting the original image in four directions. abstract_zh: 近年来，图像修复领域发展迅速，基于学习的方法在填充图像中缺失部分的任务中显示出令人印象深刻的结果。但大多数深度方法都与训练图像的分辨率密切相关。分辨率的轻微增加会导致严重的伪影和填充质量不令人满意。因此这些方法不适合交互式图像处理。在本文中，我们提出了一种解决任意大小图像修复问题的方法。我们还描述了一种更好地恢复填充区域中的纹理片段的方法。为此，我们建议通过在四个方向上移动原始图像来使用来自相邻像素的信息。此外，这种方法可以与现有的修复模型一起使用，使它们几乎与分辨率无关，而不需要重新训练。我们还创建了一个 GIMP 插件来实现我们的技术。插件、代码和模型权重可在 https://github.com/a-mos/High_Resolution_Image_Inpainting 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种解决高分辨率图像修复问题的深度两阶段方法，能够处理任意尺寸图像并提升填充质量。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在图像分辨率提升时易产生伪影且修复质量下降，难以满足交互式图像处理需求。
AI.method: 通过四方向图像偏移获取相邻像素信息增强纹理修复，该方法可与现有模型结合实现分辨率无关的修复，无需重新训练。
AI.result: 开发了GIMP插件实现该技术，实验表明方法有效提升修复质量且兼容现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 提出的两阶段方法解决了高分辨率图像修复的分辨率依赖问题，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Deep Two-Stage High-Resolution Image Inpainting 深度两阶段高分辨率图像修复 In recent years, the field of image inpainting has developed rapidly, learning based approaches show impressive results in the task of filling missing parts in an image. But most deep methods are strongly tied to the resolution of the images on which they were trained. A slight resolution increase leads to serious artifacts and unsatisfactory filling quality. These methods are therefore unsuitable for interactive image processing. In this article, we propose a method that solves the problem of inpainting arbitrary-size images. We also describe a way to better restore texture fragments in the filled area. For this, we propose to use information from neighboring pixels by shifting the original image in four directions. Moreover, this approach can work with existing inpainting models, making them almost resolution independent without the need for retraining. We also created a GIMP plugin that implements our technique. The plugin, code, and model weights are available at https://github.com/a-mos/High_Resolution_Image_Inpainting. 近年来，图像修复领域发展迅速，基于学习的方法在填充图像中缺失部分的任务中显示出令人印象深刻的结果。但大多数深度方法都与训练图像的分辨率密切相关。分辨率的轻微增加会导致严重的伪影和填充质量不令人满意。因此这些方法不适合交互式图像处理。在本文中，我们提出了一种解决任意大小图像修复问题的方法。我们还描述了一种更好地恢复填充区域中的纹理片段的方法。为此，我们建议通过在四个方向上移动原始图像来使用来自相邻像素的信息。此外，这种方法可以与现有的修复模型一起使用，使它们几乎与分辨率无关，而不需要重新训练。我们还创建了一个 GIMP 插件来实现我们的技术。插件、代码和模型权重可在 https://github.com/a-mos/High_Resolution_Image_Inpainting 获取。 本文提出一种解决高分辨率图像修复问题的深度两阶段方法，能够处理任意尺寸图像并提升填充质量。 Andrey Moskalenko,Mikhail Erofeev,Dmitriy Vatolin eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: J. Ian Munro,Patrick K. Nicholson,Louisa Seelbach Benkner,Sebastian Wild
title: Hypersuccinct Trees -- New universal tree source codes for optimal compressed tree data structures and range minima
title_zh: 超简洁树——用于最佳压缩树数据结构和范围最小值的新通用树源代码
comment: part of ESA 2021
comments: part of ESA 2021
abstract: We present a new universal source code for distributions of unlabeled binary and ordinal trees that achieves optimal compression to within lower order terms for all tree sources covered by existing universal codes. At the same time, it supports answering many navigational queries on the compressed representation in constant time on the word-RAM; this is not known to be possible for any existing tree compression method. The resulting data structures, "hypersuccinct trees", hence combine the compression achieved by the best known universal codes with the operation support of the best succinct tree data structures. We apply hypersuccinct trees to obtain a universal compressed data structure for range-minimum queries. It has constant query time and the optimal worst-case space usage of $2n+o(n)$ bits, but the space drops to $1.736n + o(n)$ bits on average for random permutations of $n$ elements, and $2\lg\binom nr + o(n)$ for arrays with $r$ increasing runs, respectively. Both results are optimal; the former answers an open problem of Davoodi et al. (2014) and Golin et al. (2016). Compared to prior work on succinct data structures, we do not have to tailor our data structure to specific applications; hypersuccinct trees automatically adapt to the trees at hand. We show that they simultaneously achieve the optimal space usage to within lower order terms for a wide range of distributions over tree shapes, including: binary search trees (BSTs) generated by insertions in random order / Cartesian trees of random arrays, random fringe-balanced BSTs, binary trees with a given number of binary/unary/leaf nodes, random binary tries generated from memoryless sources, full binary trees, unary paths, as well as uniformly chosen weight-balanced BSTs, AVL trees, and left-leaning red-black trees.

abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的通用源代码，用于未标记的二叉树和序数树的分布，该源代码可以将现有通用代码覆盖的所有树源实现最佳压缩到低阶项内。同时，它支持在字RAM上以恒定的时间回答对压缩表示的许多导航查询；据了解，这对于任何现有的树压缩方法来说都是不可能的。由此产生的数据结构“超简洁树”将最知名的通用代码实现的压缩与最佳简洁树数据结构的操作支持结合起来。我们应用超简洁树来获得用于最小范围查询的通用压缩数据结构。它具有恒定的查询时间和 $2n+o(n)$ 位的最佳最坏情况空间使用量，但对于 $n$ 元素的随机排列，空间平均下降到 $1.736n + o(n)$ 位，对于具有 $r$ 增加运行的数组，空间分别下降到 $2\lg\binom nr + o(n)$ 。两个结果都是最优的；前者回答了 Davoodi 等人的一个开放问题。 （2014）和戈林等人。 （2016）。与之前关于简洁数据结构的工作相比，我们不必针对特定应用程序定制数据结构；超简洁树会自动适应手边的树。我们表明，它们同时在树形状的各种分布的低阶项内实现了最佳空间使用，包括：通过随机数组插入随机顺序/笛卡尔树生成的二叉搜索树（BST）、随机边缘平衡 BST、具有给定数量的二元/一元/叶节点的二叉树、从无记忆源生成的随机二元尝试、完整二叉树、一元路径以及统一选择的权重平衡 BST、AVL 树和左倾红黑树。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'超简洁树'的新方法，实现了对无标签二叉树和序树的最优压缩，并支持在压缩表示上进行常数时间导航查询。
AI.motivation: 现有树压缩方法要么无法高效支持查询操作，要么需要针对特定应用场景定制数据结构，缺乏通用性和最优空间利用的平衡。
AI.method: 设计了一种通用源代码，结合最优压缩率与简洁树数据结构的查询能力，通过超简洁树实现对多种树分布的自适应压缩与查询支持。
AI.result: 超简洁树在最坏情况下使用2n+o(n)位空间，平均情况下降至1.736n+o(n)位，同时支持常数时间范围最小值查询，解决了多项开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: 超简洁树通过统一框架实现了最优压缩率与高效查询的结合，适用于多种树分布，为通用树数据结构设计提供了新范式。

authors_text: Jian Wang,Lingjie Liu,Weipeng Xu,Kripasindhu Sarkar,Christian Theobalt
title: Estimating Egocentric 3D Human Pose in Global Space
title_zh: 估计全球空间中以自我为中心的 3D 人体姿势
comment: ICCV 2021
comments: ICCV 2021
abstract: Egocentric 3D human pose estimation using a single fisheye camera has become popular recently as it allows capturing a wide range of daily activities in unconstrained environments, which is difficult for traditional outside-in motion capture with external cameras. However, existing methods have several limitations. A prominent problem is that the estimated poses lie in the local coordinate system of the fisheye camera, rather than in the world coordinate system, which is restrictive for many applications. Furthermore, these methods suffer from limited accuracy and temporal instability due to ambiguities caused by the monocular setup and the severe occlusion in a strongly distorted egocentric perspective. To tackle these limitations, we present a new method for egocentric global 3D body pose estimation using a single head-mounted fisheye camera. To achieve accurate and temporally stable global poses, a spatio-temporal optimization is performed over a sequence of frames by minimizing heatmap reprojection errors and enforcing local and global body motion priors learned from a mocap dataset. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and qualitatively.

abstract_zh: 使用单个鱼眼相机进行以自我为中心的 3D 人体姿势估计最近变得很流行，因为它允许在不受约束的环境中捕获各种日常活动，而这对于使用外部相机进行传统的由外向内的运动捕捉来说是困难的。然而，现有方法有一些局限性。一个突出的问题是估计的位姿位于鱼眼相机的局部坐标系中，而不是世界坐标系中，这对于许多应用来说是限制性的。此外，由于单眼设置和强烈扭曲的自我中心视角中的严重遮挡造成的模糊性，这些方法的准确性有限，并且时间不稳定。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种使用单个头戴式鱼眼相机进行以自我为中心的全局 3D 身体姿势估计的新方法。为了实现准确且时间稳定的全局姿势，通过最小化热图重投影误差并强制执行从动作捕捉数据集学习到的局部和全局身体运动先验，对一系列帧执行时空优化。实验结果表明，我们的方法在数量和质量上都优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用单个鱼眼相机进行第一人称视角下的全局三维人体姿态估计的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的方法在估计第一人称视角下的人体姿态时，结果局限于鱼眼相机的局部坐标系，且由于单目设置和严重遮挡问题，存在精度有限和时间不稳定的问题。
AI.method: 该方法通过在一系列帧上进行时空优化，最小化热图重投影误差，并利用从动作捕捉数据集中学习到的局部和全局人体运动先验知识，以实现准确且时间稳定的全局姿态估计。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在定量和定性方面均优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了第一人称视角下三维人体姿态估计中的局限性，为相关应用提供了更准确和稳定的解决方案。

Furthermore, these methods suffer from limited accuracy and temporal instability due to ambiguities caused by the monocular setup and the severe occlusion in a strongly distorted egocentric perspective. To tackle these limitations, we present a new method for egocentric global 3D body pose estimation using a single head-mounted fisheye camera. To achieve accurate and temporally stable global poses, a spatio-temporal optimization is performed over a sequence of frames by minimizing heatmap reprojection errors and enforcing local and global body motion priors learned from a mocap dataset. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and qualitatively. 使用单个鱼眼相机进行以自我为中心的 3D 人体姿势估计最近变得很流行，因为它允许在不受约束的环境中捕获各种日常活动，而这对于使用外部相机进行传统的由外向内的运动捕捉来说是困难的。然而，现有方法有一些局限性。一个突出的问题是估计的位姿位于鱼眼相机的局部坐标系中，而不是世界坐标系中，这对于许多应用来说是限制性的。此外，由于单眼设置和强烈扭曲的自我中心视角中的严重遮挡造成的模糊性，这些方法的准确性有限，并且时间不稳定。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种使用单个头戴式鱼眼相机进行以自我为中心的全局 3D 身体姿势估计的新方法。为了实现准确且时间稳定的全局姿势，通过最小化热图重投影误差并强制执行从动作捕捉数据集学习到的局部和全局身体运动先验，对一系列帧执行时空优化。实验结果表明，我们的方法在数量和质量上都优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种使用单个鱼眼相机进行第一人称视角下的全局三维人体姿态估计的新方法。 Jian Wang,Lingjie Liu,Weipeng Xu,Kripasindhu Sarkar,Christian Theobalt cs.CV

authors_text: Zeyang Liu,Ke Zhou,Max L. Wilson
title: Meta-evaluation of Conversational Search Evaluation Metrics
title_zh: 会话搜索评估指标的元评估
comment: 43 pages
comments: 43 pages
abstract: Conversational search systems, such as Google Assistant and Microsoft Cortana, enable users to interact with search systems in multiple rounds through natural language dialogues. Evaluating such systems is very challenging given that any natural language responses could be generated, and users commonly interact for multiple semantically coherent rounds to accomplish a search task. Although prior studies proposed many evaluation metrics, the extent of how those measures effectively capture user preference remains to be investigated. In this paper, we systematically meta-evaluate a variety of conversational search metrics. We specifically study three perspectives on those metrics: (1) reliability: the ability to detect "actual" performance differences as opposed to those observed by chance; (2) fidelity: the ability to agree with ultimate user preference; and (3) intuitiveness: the ability to capture any property deemed important: adequacy, informativeness, and fluency in the context of conversational search. By conducting experiments on two test collections, we find that the performance of different metrics varies significantly across different scenarios whereas consistent with prior studies, existing metrics only achieve a weak correlation with ultimate user preference and satisfaction. METEOR is, comparatively speaking, the best existing single-turn metric considering all three perspectives. We also demonstrate that adapted session-based evaluation metrics can be used to measure multi-turn conversational search, achieving moderate concordance with user satisfaction. To our knowledge, our work establishes the most comprehensive meta-evaluation for conversational search to date.

abstract_zh: 会话式搜索系统，例如Google Assistant和Microsoft Cortana，使用户能够通过自然语言对话与搜索系统进行多轮交互。考虑到可以生成任何自然语言响应，并且用户通常进行多轮语义一致的交互来完成搜索任务，评估此类系统非常具有挑战性。尽管之前的研究提出了许多评估指标，但这些指标如何有效捕获用户偏好的程度仍有待研究。在本文中，我们系统地元评估了各种会话搜索指标。我们专门研究了这些指标的三个方面：（1）可靠性：检测“实际”性能差异而不是偶然观察到的性能差异的能力； (2) 忠诚度：同意用户最终偏好的能力； (3) 直观性：捕获任何被认为重要的属性的能力：会话搜索上下文中的充分性、信息量和流畅性。通过对两个测试集进行实验，我们发现不同指标的性能在不同场景下存在显着差异，而与之前的研究一致，现有指标仅与最终用户偏好和满意度实现弱相关。相对而言，从这三个角度考虑，METEOR 是现有最好的单轮指标。我们还证明，经过调整的基于会话的评估指标可用于衡量多轮对话搜索，从而与用户满意度实现适度的一致性。据我们所知，我们的工作为对话搜索建立了迄今为止最全面的元评估。

AI.tldr: 本文对多种对话式搜索评估指标进行了系统性元评估，分析其在可靠性、忠实度和直观性三个维度的表现。
AI.motivation: 对话式搜索系统因多轮交互和自然语言响应的复杂性，评估难度较高，现有指标与用户偏好关联性弱，需系统验证其有效性。
AI.method: 通过两个测试集实验，从可靠性（区分实际性能差异）、忠实度（与用户偏好一致性）和直观性（捕捉相关性、信息量和流畅性）三个角度评估指标。
AI.result: 不同指标在不同场景表现差异显著，现有指标与用户满意度相关性较弱，METEOR为最佳单轮指标，改进后的会话指标可中等程度反映多轮搜索满意度。
AI.conclusion: 本文构建了当前最全面的对话式搜索评估元分析框架，揭示现有指标局限性并为未来研究提供方向。
