authors_text: Innfarn Yoo,Huiwen Chang,Xiyang Luo,Ondrej Stava,Ce Liu,Peyman Milanfar,Feng Yang
title: Deep 3D-to-2D Watermarking: Embedding Messages in 3D Meshes and Extracting Them from 2D Renderings
title_zh: 深度 3D 到 2D 水印：在 3D 网格中嵌入消息并从 2D 渲染中提取消息
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022
abstract: Digital watermarking is widely used for copyright protection. Traditional 3D watermarking approaches or commercial software are typically designed to embed messages into 3D meshes, and later retrieve the messages directly from distorted/undistorted watermarked 3D meshes. However, in many cases, users only have access to rendered 2D images instead of 3D meshes. Unfortunately, retrieving messages from 2D renderings of 3D meshes is still challenging and underexplored. We introduce a novel end-to-end learning framework to solve this problem through: 1) an encoder to covertly embed messages in both mesh geometry and textures; 2) a differentiable renderer to render watermarked 3D objects from different camera angles and under varied lighting conditions; 3) a decoder to recover the messages from 2D rendered images. From our experiments, we show that our model can learn to embed information visually imperceptible to humans, and to retrieve the embedded information from 2D renderings that undergo 3D distortions. In addition, we demonstrate that our method can also work with other renderers, such as ray tracers and real-time renderers with and without fine-tuning.

abstract_zh: 数字水印广泛用于版权保护。传统的 3D 水印方法或商业软件通常设计为将消息嵌入到 3D 网格中，然后直接从扭曲/未扭曲的水印 3D 网格中检索消息。然而，在许多情况下，用户只能访问渲染的 2D 图像而不是 3D 网格。不幸的是，从 3D 网格的 2D 渲染中检索消息仍然具有挑战性并且尚未得到充分探索。我们引入了一种新颖的端到端学习框架，通过以下方式解决这个问题：1）编码器将消息秘密嵌入网格几何和纹理中； 2) 可微分渲染器，用于从不同摄像机角度和不同光照条件下渲染带水印的 3D 对象； 3) 用于从 2D 渲染图像中恢复消息的解码器。从我们的实验中，我们表明我们的模型可以学习嵌入人类视觉上难以察觉的信息，并从经历 3D 扭曲的 2D 渲染中检索嵌入的信息。此外，我们证明我们的方法还可以与其他渲染器一起使用，例如光线追踪器和实时渲染器（带或不带微调）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将信息嵌入3D网格并在其2D渲染图像中提取水印的端到端学习框架。
AI.motivation: 传统3D水印方法需直接从3D网格提取信息，但实际场景中用户常仅能获取2D渲染图像，导致从2D图像中提取3D水印的挑战尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 通过三部分实现：1) 编码器将信息嵌入3D网格几何与纹理；2) 可微分渲染器生成多视角、多光照条件的2D水印图像；3) 解码器从2D图像中恢复嵌入信息。
AI.result: 实验表明模型能学习视觉不可感知的嵌入方式，并从经历3D畸变的2D渲染图像中准确提取信息，且方法兼容其他渲染器（如光线追踪器）。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了从2D渲染图像中提取3D水印的难题，具有跨渲染器的通用性与鲁棒性。

In addition, we demonstrate that our method can also work with other renderers, such as ray tracers and real-time renderers with and without fine-tuning. 数字水印广泛用于版权保护。传统的 3D 水印方法或商业软件通常设计为将消息嵌入到 3D 网格中，然后直接从扭曲/未扭曲的水印 3D 网格中检索消息。然而，在许多情况下，用户只能访问渲染的 2D 图像而不是 3D 网格。不幸的是，从 3D 网格的 2D 渲染中检索消息仍然具有挑战性并且尚未得到充分探索。我们引入了一种新颖的端到端学习框架，通过以下方式解决这个问题：1）编码器将消息秘密嵌入网格几何和纹理中； 2) 可微分渲染器，用于从不同摄像机角度和不同光照条件下渲染带水印的 3D 对象； 3) 用于从 2D 渲染图像中恢复消息的解码器。从我们的实验中，我们表明我们的模型可以学习嵌入人类视觉上难以察觉的信息，并从经历 3D 扭曲的 2D 渲染中检索嵌入的信息。此外，我们证明我们的方法还可以与其他渲染器一起使用，例如光线追踪器和实时渲染器（带或不带微调）。 本文提出一种将信息嵌入3D网格并在其2D渲染图像中提取水印的端到端学习框架。 Innfarn Yoo,Huiwen Chang,Xiyang Luo,Ondrej Stava,Ce Liu,Peyman Milanfar,Feng Yang cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Elvis Nunez,Andrew Lizarraga,Shantanu H. Joshi
title: SrvfNet: A Generative Network for Unsupervised Multiple Diffeomorphic Shape Alignment
title_zh: SrvfNet：用于无监督多重微分同胚形状对齐的生成网络
abstract: We present SrvfNet, a generative deep learning framework for the joint multiple alignment of large collections of functional data comprising square-root velocity functions (SRVF) to their templates. Our proposed framework is fully unsupervised and is capable of aligning to a predefined template as well as jointly predicting an optimal template from data while simultaneously achieving alignment. Our network is constructed as a generative encoder-decoder architecture comprising fully-connected layers capable of producing a distribution space of the warping functions. We demonstrate the strength of our framework by validating it on synthetic data as well as diffusion profiles from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data.
summary: We present SrvfNet, a generative deep learning framework for the joint multiple alignment of large collections of functional data comprising square-root velocity functions (SRVF) to their templates. Our proposed framework is fully unsupervised and is capable of aligning to a predefined template as well as jointly predicting an optimal template from data while simultaneously achieving alignment. Our network is constructed as a generative encoder-decoder architecture comprising fully-connected layers capable of producing a distribution space of the warping functions. We demonstrate the strength of our framework by validating it on synthetic data as well as diffusion profiles from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 SrvfNet，这是一种生成式深度学习框架，用于将包含平方根速度函数 (SRVF) 的大型功能数据集合与其模板进行联合多重对齐。我们提出的框架是完全无监督的，能够与预定义的模板对齐，并能够从数据中联合预测最佳模板，同时实现对齐。我们的网络被构建为生成式编码器-解码器架构，包含能够产生扭曲函数的分布空间的全连接层。我们通过合成数据以及磁共振成像 (MRI) 数据的扩散剖面来验证我们的框架的强度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督生成网络SrvfNet，用于对包含平方根速度函数（SRVF）的功能数据进行多变形形状对齐，并能同时预测最优模板。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常依赖监督学习或无法同时优化对齐与模板预测，而本文旨在开发一种无监督框架，实现数据驱动的联合对齐与模板生成。
AI.method: 采用生成式编码器-解码器架构，通过全连接层建模战争函数的分布空间，实现无监督下的多变形对齐与模板预测。
AI.result: 在合成数据和MRI扩散数据集上验证了方法的有效性，证明其在对齐精度和模板预测能力上的优越性。
AI.conclusion: SrvfNet为无监督形状对齐提供了新思路，能够自适应生成最优模板，适用于复杂功能数据的分析任务。

authors_text: Murat Tulgaç,Enes Yüncü,Mohamad-Alhaddad,Ceylan Yozgatlıgil
title: Incident Detection on Junctions Using Image Processing
title_zh: 使用图像处理对路口进行事故检测
abstract: In traffic management, it is a very important issue to shorten the response time by detecting the incidents (accident, vehicle breakdown, an object falling on the road, etc.) and informing the corresponding personnel. In this study, an anomaly detection framework for road junctions is proposed. The final judgment is based on the trajectories followed by the vehicles. Trajectory information is provided by vehicle detection and tracking algorithms on visual data streamed from a fisheye camera. Deep learning algorithms are used for vehicle detection, and Kalman Filter is used for tracking. To observe the trajectories more accurately, the detected vehicle coordinates are transferred to the bird's eye view coordinates using the lens distortion model prediction algorithm. The system determines whether there is an abnormality in trajectories by comparing historical trajectory data and instantaneous incoming data. The proposed system has achieved 84.6% success in vehicle detection and 96.8% success in abnormality detection on synthetic data. The system also works with a 97.3% success rate in detecting abnormalities on real data.
summary: In traffic management, it is a very important issue to shorten the response time by detecting the incidents (accident, vehicle breakdown, an object falling on the road, etc.) and informing the corresponding personnel. abstract_zh: 在交通管理中，通过检测事件（事故、车辆故障、道路上掉落的物体等）并通知相应人员来缩短响应时间是一个非常重要的问题。在这项研究中，提出了一种路口异常检测框架。最终的判断是根据车辆行驶的轨迹来进行的。轨迹信息由车辆检测和跟踪算法根据鱼眼相机流式传输的视觉数据提供。深度学习算法用于车辆检测，卡尔曼滤波器用于跟踪。为了更准确地观察轨迹，使用镜头畸变模型预测算法将检测到的车辆坐标转换为鸟瞰坐标。系统通过比较历史轨迹数据和瞬时传入数据来判断轨迹是否存在异常。所提出的系统在车辆检测方面取得了 84.6% 的成功率，在合成数据的异常检测方面取得了 96.8% 的成功率。该系统在检测真实数据异常方面的成功率为 97.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图像处理的路口异常事件检测系统。
AI.motivation: 在交通管理中，快速检测事故、车辆故障等异常事件并通知相关人员非常重要。
AI.method: 使用深度学习算法进行车辆检测，结合卡尔曼滤波进行跟踪，并利用鱼眼镜头畸变模型预测算法将检测到的车辆坐标转换为鸟瞰图坐标，通过比较历史轨迹数据和实时数据判断是否存在异常。
AI.result: 在合成数据上，系统实现了84.6%的车辆检测成功率和96.8%的异常检测成功率；在真实数据上，异常检测成功率达到了97.3%。
AI.conclusion: 该系统在检测路口异常事件方面表现出色，具有较高的准确性和实用性。

authors_text: Siyuan Xiang,Anbang Yang,Yanfei Xue,Yaoqing Yang,Chen Feng
title: Self-supervised Spatial Reasoning on Multi-View Line Drawings
title_zh: 多视图线图的自监督空间推理
comment: The first two authors contributed equally. Chen Feng is the corresponding author
comments: The first two authors contributed equally. Chen Feng is the corresponding author
abstract: Spatial reasoning on multi-view line drawings by state-of-the-art supervised deep networks is recently shown with puzzling low performances on the SPARE3D dataset. Based on the fact that self-supervised learning is helpful when a large number of data are available, we propose two self-supervised learning approaches to improve the baseline performance for view consistency reasoning and camera pose reasoning tasks on the SPARE3D dataset. For the first task, we use a self-supervised binary classification network to contrast the line drawing differences between various views of any two similar 3D objects, enabling the trained networks to effectively learn detail-sensitive yet view-invariant line drawing representations of 3D objects. For the second type of task, we propose a self-supervised multi-class classification framework to train a model to select the correct corresponding view from which a line drawing is rendered. Our method is even helpful for the downstream tasks with unseen camera poses. Experiments show that our method could significantly increase the baseline performance in SPARE3D, while some popular self-supervised learning methods cannot.
summary: Spatial reasoning on multi-view line drawings by state-of-the-art supervised deep networks is recently shown with puzzling low performances on the SPARE3D dataset. Based on the fact that self-supervised learning is helpful when a large number of data are available, we propose two self-supervised learning approaches to improve the baseline performance for view consistency reasoning and camera pose reasoning tasks on the SPARE3D dataset. For the first task, we use a self-supervised binary classification network to contrast the line drawing differences between various views of any two similar 3D objects, enabling the trained networks to effectively learn detail-sensitive yet view-invariant line drawing representations of 3D objects. For the second type of task, we propose a self-supervised multi-class classification framework to train a model to select the correct corresponding view from which a line drawing is rendered. Our method is even helpful for the downstream tasks with unseen camera poses. Experiments show that our method could significantly increase the baseline performance in SPARE3D, while some popular self-supervised learning methods cannot.
abstract_zh: 最近，通过最先进的监督深度网络对多视图线图进行空间推理，在 SPARE3D 数据集上表现出令人困惑的低性能。基于自监督学习在大量数据可用时很有帮助这一事实，我们提出了两种自监督学习方法来提高 SPARE3D 数据集上视图一致性推理和相机姿态推理任务的基线性能。对于第一个任务，我们使用自监督二元分类网络来对比任何两个相似 3D 对象的不同视图之间的线条绘制差异，使训练后的网络能够有效地学习 3D 对象的细节敏感但视图不变的线条绘制表示。对于第二类任务，我们提出了一种自监督多类分类框架来训练模型以选择渲染线条图的正确对应视图。我们的方法甚至对于具有看不见的相机姿势的下游任务很有帮助。实验表明，我们的方法可以显着提高 SPARE3D 中的基线性能，而一些流行的自监督学习方法却不能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种自监督学习方法，以提升在SPARE3D数据集上多视角线图的视图一致性推理和相机位姿推理任务的基线性能。
AI.motivation: 现有监督深度网络在SPARE3D数据集上的表现不佳，而自监督学习在数据充足时能有效提升模型性能。
AI.method: 第一种方法采用自监督二分类网络对比相似3D物体不同视角的线图差异；第二种方法提出自监督多分类框架，训练模型从多视角中选择正确渲染视图。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提升SPARE3D基线性能，而其他流行自监督方法无法达到此效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自监督方法有效解决了多视角线图的空间推理问题，且对未见过的相机位姿具有鲁棒性。

search_text: Self-supervised Spatial Reasoning on Multi-View Line Drawings 多视图线图的自监督空间推理 Spatial reasoning on multi-view line drawings by state-of-the-art supervised deep networks is recently shown with puzzling low performances on the SPARE3D dataset. Based on the fact that self-supervised learning is helpful when a large number of data are available, we propose two self-supervised learning approaches to improve the baseline performance for view consistency reasoning and camera pose reasoning tasks on the SPARE3D dataset. For the first task, we use a self-supervised binary classification network to contrast the line drawing differences between various views of any two similar 3D objects, enabling the trained networks to effectively learn detail-sensitive yet view-invariant line drawing representations of 3D objects. For the second type of task, we propose a self-supervised multi-class classification framework to train a model to select the correct corresponding view from which a line drawing is rendered. Our method is even helpful for the downstream tasks with unseen camera poses. Experiments show that our method could significantly increase the baseline performance in SPARE3D, while some popular self-supervised learning methods cannot. 最近，通过最先进的监督深度网络对多视图线图进行空间推理，在 SPARE3D 数据集上表现出令人困惑的低性能。基于自监督学习在大量数据可用时很有帮助这一事实，我们提出了两种自监督学习方法来提高 SPARE3D 数据集上视图一致性推理和相机姿态推理任务的基线性能。对于第一个任务，我们使用自监督二元分类网络来对比任何两个相似 3D 对象的不同视图之间的线条绘制差异，使训练后的网络能够有效地学习 3D 对象的细节敏感但视图不变的线条绘制表示。对于第二类任务，我们提出了一种自监督多类分类框架来训练模型以选择渲染线条图的正确对应视图。我们的方法甚至对于具有看不见的相机姿势的下游任务很有帮助。实验表明，我们的方法可以显着提高 SPARE3D 中的基线性能，而一些流行的自监督学习方法却不能。 本文提出两种自监督学习方法，以提升在SPARE3D数据集上多视角线图的视图一致性推理和相机位姿推理任务的基线性能。 Siyuan Xiang,Anbang Yang,Yanfei Xue,Yaoqing Yang,Chen Feng cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Nemanja Rakicevic,Antoine Cully,Petar Kormushev
title: Policy Manifold Search: Exploring the Manifold Hypothesis for Diversity-based Neuroevolution
title_zh: 政策流形搜索：探索基于多样性的神经进化的流形假设
comment: Accepted as a full paper at Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference, GECCO 2021. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.08676
comments: Accepted as a full paper at Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference, GECCO 2021. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.08676
abstract: Neuroevolution is an alternative to gradient-based optimisation that has the potential to avoid local minima and allows parallelisation. The main limiting factor is that usually it does not scale well with parameter space dimensionality. Inspired by recent work examining neural network intrinsic dimension and loss landscapes, we hypothesise that there exists a low-dimensional manifold, embedded in the policy network parameter space, around which a high-density of diverse and useful policies are located. This paper proposes a novel method for diversity-based policy search via Neuroevolution, that leverages learned representations of the policy network parameters, by performing policy search in this learned representation space. Our method relies on the Quality-Diversity (QD) framework which provides a principled approach to policy search, and maintains a collection of diverse policies, used as a dataset for learning policy representations. Further, we use the Jacobian of the inverse-mapping function to guide the search in the representation space. This ensures that the generated samples remain in the high-density regions, after mapping back to the original space. Finally, we evaluate our contributions on four continuous-control tasks in simulated environments, and compare to diversity-based baselines.

abstract_zh: 神经进化是基于梯度的优化的替代方案，它有可能避免局部极小值并允许并行化。主要限制因素是它通常不能很好地随参数空间维度缩放。受最近研究神经网络内在维度和损失景观的工作的启发，我们假设存在一个嵌入在策略网络参数空间中的低维流形，周围有高密度的多样化且有用的策略。本文提出了一种通过神经进化进行基于多样性的策略搜索的新方法，该方法通过在学习的表示空间中执行策略搜索来利用策略网络参数的学习表示。我们的方法依赖于质量多样性（QD）框架，该框架提供了策略搜索的原则性方法，并维护了不同策略的集合，用作学习策略表示的数据集。此外，我们使用逆映射函数的雅可比行列式来指导表示空间中的搜索。这确保了生成的样本在映射回原始空间后仍保留在高密度区域中。最后，我们评估了我们在模拟环境中对四个连续控制任务的贡献，并与基于多样性的基线进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于流形假设的多样性神经进化方法，在策略网络参数空间中探索低维流形以提升高维空间中的策略搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 传统神经进化方法在参数空间维度增加时扩展性差，而低维流形假设表明高密度优质策略可能集中在参数空间的低维区域，需探索该特性以提升搜索效率。
AI.method: 基于QD框架构建多样化策略集合，学习策略参数表示空间，并利用逆映射雅可比矩阵引导表示空间搜索，确保映射回原空间后仍位于高密度区域。
AI.result: 在四个连续控制任务中验证方法有效性，相比多样性基线方法表现出更优的策略探索能力与性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合流形假设与QD框架，提出的方法在保持多样性的同时提升了高维策略空间搜索效率，为神经进化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Abigail Copiaco,Christian Ritz,Stefano Fasciani,Nidhal Abdulaziz
title: DASEE A Synthetic Database of Domestic Acoustic Scenes and Events in Dementia Patients Environment
title_zh: DASEE 痴呆症患者环境中的家庭声学场景和事件的综合数据库
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables
abstract: Access to informative databases is a crucial part of notable research developments. In the field of domestic audio classification, there have been significant advances in recent years. Although several audio databases exist, these can be limited in terms of the amount of information they provide, such as the exact location of the sound sources, and the associated noise levels. In this work, we detail our approach on generating an unbiased synthetic domestic audio database, consisting of sound scenes and events, emulated in both quiet and noisy environments. Data is carefully curated such that it reflects issues commonly faced in a dementia patients environment, and recreate scenarios that could occur in real-world settings. Similarly, the room impulse response generated is based on a typical one-bedroom apartment at Hebrew SeniorLife Facility. As a result, we present an 11-class database containing excerpts of clean and noisy signals at 5-seconds duration each, uniformly sampled at 16 kHz. Using our baseline model using Continues Wavelet Transform Scalograms and AlexNet, this yielded a weighted F1-score of 86.24 percent.

abstract_zh: 访问信息数据库是显着研究进展的关键部分。在国内音频分类领域，近年来取得了显着的进展。尽管存在多个音频数据库，但这些数据库所提供的信息量可能受到限制，例如声源的确切位置以及相关的噪音水平。在这项工作中，我们详细介绍了生成无偏见的合成家庭音频数据库的方法，该数据库由声音场景和事件组成，在安静和嘈杂的环境中进行模拟。数据经过精心整理，反映了痴呆症患者环境中常见的问题，并重现了现实世界中可能发生的场景。同样，生成的房间脉冲响应是基于希伯来高级生活设施的典型一卧室公寓。因此，我们提出了一个 11 类数据库，其中包含每个持续 5 秒的干净信号和噪声信号的摘录，以 16 kHz 均匀采样。使用我们的基线模型（使用连续小波变换尺度图和 AlexNet），得出的加权 F1 分数为 86.24%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个合成数据库DASEE，用于分类痴呆患者家庭环境中的声音场景和事件。
AI.motivation: 现有音频数据库缺乏对痴呆患者环境的声源位置和噪声水平的精确描述，限制了相关研究的发展。
AI.method: 通过合成生成安静与嘈杂环境下的声音场景，基于典型一居室公寓的房间脉冲响应，构建11类5秒时长的16kHz音频数据集，并采用连续小波变换和AlexNet进行分类验证。
AI.result: 基线模型在DASEE数据集上达到86.24%的加权F1分数，验证了数据库的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DASEE数据库为研究痴呆患者环境中的音频分类提供了标准化数据支持，推动相关算法的开发与评估。

Using our baseline model using Continues Wavelet Transform Scalograms and AlexNet, this yielded a weighted F1-score of 86.24 percent. 访问信息数据库是显着研究进展的关键部分。在国内音频分类领域，近年来取得了显着的进展。尽管存在多个音频数据库，但这些数据库所提供的信息量可能受到限制，例如声源的确切位置以及相关的噪音水平。在这项工作中，我们详细介绍了生成无偏见的合成家庭音频数据库的方法，该数据库由声音场景和事件组成，在安静和嘈杂的环境中进行模拟。数据经过精心整理，反映了痴呆症患者环境中常见的问题，并重现了现实世界中可能发生的场景。同样，生成的房间脉冲响应是基于希伯来高级生活设施的典型一卧室公寓。因此，我们提出了一个 11 类数据库，其中包含每个持续 5 秒的干净信号和噪声信号的摘录，以 16 kHz 均匀采样。使用我们的基线模型（使用连续小波变换尺度图和 AlexNet），得出的加权 F1 分数为 86.24%。 本文提出一个合成数据库DASEE，用于分类痴呆患者家庭环境中的声音场景和事件。 Abigail Copiaco,Christian Ritz,Stefano Fasciani,Nidhal Abdulaziz eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Weituo Hao,Mostafa El-Khamy,Jungwon Lee,Jianyi Zhang,Kevin J Liang,Changyou Chen,Lawrence Carin
title: Towards Fair Federated Learning with Zero-Shot Data Augmentation
title_zh: 通过零样本数据增强实现公平的联合学习
comment: Accepted by IEEE CVPR Workshop on Fair, Data Efficient And Trusted Computer Vision
comments: Accepted by IEEE CVPR Workshop on Fair, Data Efficient And Trusted Computer Vision
abstract: Federated learning has emerged as an important distributed learning paradigm, where a server aggregates a global model from many client-trained models while having no access to the client data. Although it is recognized that statistical heterogeneity of the client local data yields slower global model convergence, it is less commonly recognized that it also yields a biased federated global model with a high variance of accuracy across clients. In this work, we aim to provide federated learning schemes with improved fairness. To tackle this challenge, we propose a novel federated learning system that employs zero-shot data augmentation on under-represented data to mitigate statistical heterogeneity and encourage more uniform accuracy performance across clients in federated networks. We study two variants of this scheme, Fed-ZDAC (federated learning with zero-shot data augmentation at the clients) and Fed-ZDAS (federated learning with zero-shot data augmentation at the server). Empirical results on a suite of datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods on simultaneously improving the test accuracy and fairness.
summary: Federated learning has emerged as an important distributed learning paradigm, where a server aggregates a global model from many client-trained models while having no access to the client data. Although it is recognized that statistical heterogeneity of the client local data yields slower global model convergence, it is less commonly recognized that it also yields a biased federated global model with a high variance of accuracy across clients. In this work, we aim to provide federated learning schemes with improved fairness. To tackle this challenge, we propose a novel federated learning system that employs zero-shot data augmentation on under-represented data to mitigate statistical heterogeneity and encourage more uniform accuracy performance across clients in federated networks. We study two variants of this scheme, Fed-ZDAC (federated learning with zero-shot data augmentation at the clients) and Fed-ZDAS (federated learning with zero-shot data augmentation at the server). Empirical results on a suite of datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods on simultaneously improving the test accuracy and fairness.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习已成为一种重要的分布式学习范例，其中服务器从许多客户端训练的模型中聚合全局模型，但无法访问客户端数据。尽管人们认识到客户端本地数据的统计异质性会导致全局模型收敛速度变慢，但很少有人认识到它也会产生在客户端之间精度差异较大的有偏差的联合全局模型。在这项工作中，我们的目标是提供提高公平性的联邦学习方案。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的联邦学习系统，该系统对代表性不足的数据采用零样本数据增强，以减轻统计异质性并鼓励联邦网络中跨客户端的更统一的准确性性能。我们研究了该方案的两种变体：Fed-ZDAC（在客户端进行零样本数据增强的联邦学习）和 Fed-ZDAS（在服务器处进行零样本数据增强的联邦学习）。一组数据集的实证结果证明了我们的方法在同时提高测试准确性和公平性方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于零样本数据增强的联邦学习方法，旨在提升模型在不同客户端间的公平性。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中客户端数据分布不均会导致全局模型收敛速度变慢且准确率方差较大，现有研究较少关注这一问题带来的模型偏倚。
AI.method: 设计了两种方案Fed-ZDAC（客户端进行零样本数据增强）和Fed-ZDAS（服务器端进行零样本数据增强），通过生成欠代表数据的增强样本缓解统计异质性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，该方法能同时提升测试准确率和客户端间准确率的公平性。
AI.conclusion: 零样本数据增强有效缓解了联邦学习中的数据异质性问题，为提升模型公平性提供了新思路。

authors_text: Inigo Alonso,Alberto Sabater,David Ferstl,Luis Montesano,Ana C. Murillo
title: Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation with Pixel-Level Contrastive Learning from a Class-wise Memory Bank
title_zh: 通过类记忆库进行像素级对比学习的半监督语义分割
comment: ef:IEEE International Conference on Computer Vision 2021
comments: ef:IEEE International Conference on Computer Vision 2021
abstract: This work presents a novel approach for semi-supervised semantic segmentation. The key element of this approach is our contrastive learning module that enforces the segmentation network to yield similar pixel-level feature representations for same-class samples across the whole dataset. To achieve this, we maintain a memory bank continuously updated with relevant and high-quality feature vectors from labeled data. In an end-to-end training, the features from both labeled and unlabeled data are optimized to be similar to same-class samples from the memory bank. Our approach outperforms the current state-of-the-art for semi-supervised semantic segmentation and semi-supervised domain adaptation on well-known public benchmarks, with larger improvements on the most challenging scenarios, i.e., less available labeled data. https://github.com/Shathe/SemiSeg-Contrastive

The key element of this approach is our contrastive learning module that enforces the segmentation network to yield similar pixel-level feature representations for same-class samples across the whole dataset. Our approach outperforms the current state-of-the-art for semi-supervised semantic segmentation and semi-supervised domain adaptation on well-known public benchmarks, with larger improvements on the most challenging scenarios, i.e., less available labeled data. https://github.com/Shathe/SemiSeg-Contrastive
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种半监督语义分割的新方法。这种方法的关键要素是我们的对比学习模块，它强制分割网络为整个数据集中的同类样本生成相似的像素级特征表示。为了实现这一目标，我们维护一个记忆库，不断更新来自标记数据的相关且高质量的特征向量。在端到端训练中，标记和未标记数据的特征都被优化为与存储库中的同类样本相似。我们的方法在著名的公共基准上优于半监督语义分割和半监督域适应的当前最先进技术，在最具挑战性的场景（即可用标记数据较少）上有更大的改进。 https://github.com/Shathe/SemiSeg-Contrastive

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类别记忆库的像素级对比学习方法，用于半监督语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督分割方法在标记数据稀缺时表现不足，需更有效的特征学习策略以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建类别记忆库存储高质量标记特征，通过对比学习模块使分割网络输出的像素特征与记忆库中同类样本保持一致，端到端优化标记与未标记数据特征。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中优于现有SOTA方法，尤其在标记数据极少的挑战性场景下提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 像素级对比学习结合类别记忆库能有效提升半监督分割性能，为数据稀缺场景提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Saurav Sahay,Eda Okur,Nagib Hakim,Lama Nachman
title: Semi-supervised Interactive Intent Labeling
title_zh: 半监督交互式意图标记
comment: NAACL 2021 - Workshop on Data Science with Human-in-the-loop: Language Advances (DaSH-LA)
comments: NAACL 2021 - Workshop on Data Science with Human-in-the-loop: Language Advances (DaSH-LA)
abstract: Building the Natural Language Understanding (NLU) modules of task-oriented Spoken Dialogue Systems (SDS) involves a definition of intents and entities, collection of task-relevant data, annotating the data with intents and entities, and then repeating the same process over and over again for adding any functionality/enhancement to the SDS. In this work, we showcase an Intent Bulk Labeling system where SDS developers can interactively label and augment training data from unlabeled utterance corpora using advanced clustering and visual labeling methods. We extend the Deep Aligned Clustering work with a better backbone BERT model, explore techniques to select the seed data for labeling, and develop a data balancing method using an oversampling technique that utilizes paraphrasing models. We also look at the effect of data augmentation on the clustering process. Our results show that we can achieve over 10% gain in clustering accuracy on some datasets using the combination of the above techniques. Finally, we extract utterance embeddings from the clustering model and plot the data to interactively bulk label the samples, reducing the time and effort for data labeling of the whole dataset significantly.
summary: Building the Natural Language Understanding (NLU) modules of task-oriented Spoken Dialogue Systems (SDS) involves a definition of intents and entities, collection of task-relevant data, annotating the data with intents and entities, and then repeating the same process over and over again for adding any functionality/enhancement to the SDS. In this work, we showcase an Intent Bulk Labeling system where SDS developers can interactively label and augment training data from unlabeled utterance corpora using advanced clustering and visual labeling methods. We extend the Deep Aligned Clustering work with a better backbone BERT model, explore techniques to select the seed data for labeling, and develop a data balancing method using an oversampling technique that utilizes paraphrasing models. We also look at the effect of data augmentation on the clustering process. Our results show that we can achieve over 10% gain in clustering accuracy on some datasets using the combination of the above techniques. Finally, we extract utterance embeddings from the clustering model and plot the data to interactively bulk label the samples, reducing the time and effort for data labeling of the whole dataset significantly.
abstract_zh: 构建面向任务的口语对话系统 (SDS) 的自然语言理解 (NLU) 模块涉及意图和实体的定义、任务相关数据的收集、用意图和实体注释数据，然后一遍又一遍地重复相同的过程以向 SDS 添加任何功能/增强。在这项工作中，我们展示了一个意图批量标签系统，SDS 开发人员可以使用高级聚类和视觉标签方法交互式地标记和增强来自未标记话语语料库的训练数据。我们使用更好的骨干 BERT 模型扩展深度对齐聚类工作，探索选择用于标记的种子数据的技术，并使用利用释义模型的过采样技术开发数据平衡方法。我们还研究了数据增强对聚类过程的影响。我们的结果表明，结合使用上述技术，我们可以在某些数据集上实现超过 10% 的聚类准确率增益。最后，我们从聚类模型中提取话语嵌入，并绘制数据以交互式地批量标记样本，从而显着减少整个数据集的数据标记的时间和精力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督交互式意图批量标注系统，通过聚类和可视化方法减少数据标注工作量。
AI.motivation: 传统任务导向对话系统NLU模块构建需重复进行数据标注，过程耗时且依赖大量标注数据。
AI.method: 改进Deep Aligned Clustering框架，采用BERT模型、种子数据选择技术、基于 paraphrasing 的过采样方法，并分析数据增强对聚类的影响。
AI.result: 在部分数据集上聚类准确率提升超10%，通过可视化嵌入数据实现交互式批量标注。
AI.conclusion: 系统有效降低数据标注的时间和人力成本，提升意图识别效率。

search_text: Semi-supervised Interactive Intent Labeling 半监督交互式意图标记 Building the Natural Language Understanding (NLU) modules of task-oriented Spoken Dialogue Systems (SDS) involves a definition of intents and entities, collection of task-relevant data, annotating the data with intents and entities, and then repeating the same process over and over again for adding any functionality/enhancement to the SDS. In this work, we showcase an Intent Bulk Labeling system where SDS developers can interactively label and augment training data from unlabeled utterance corpora using advanced clustering and visual labeling methods. We extend the Deep Aligned Clustering work with a better backbone BERT model, explore techniques to select the seed data for labeling, and develop a data balancing method using an oversampling technique that utilizes paraphrasing models. We also look at the effect of data augmentation on the clustering process. Our results show that we can achieve over 10% gain in clustering accuracy on some datasets using the combination of the above techniques. Finally, we extract utterance embeddings from the clustering model and plot the data to interactively bulk label the samples, reducing the time and effort for data labeling of the whole dataset significantly. 构建面向任务的口语对话系统 (SDS) 的自然语言理解 (NLU) 模块涉及意图和实体的定义、任务相关数据的收集、用意图和实体注释数据，然后一遍又一遍地重复相同的过程以向 SDS 添加任何功能/增强。在这项工作中，我们展示了一个意图批量标签系统，SDS 开发人员可以使用高级聚类和视觉标签方法交互式地标记和增强来自未标记话语语料库的训练数据。我们使用更好的骨干 BERT 模型扩展深度对齐聚类工作，探索选择用于标记的种子数据的技术，并使用利用释义模型的过采样技术开发数据平衡方法。我们还研究了数据增强对聚类过程的影响。我们的结果表明，结合使用上述技术，我们可以在某些数据集上实现超过 10% 的聚类准确率增益。最后，我们从聚类模型中提取话语嵌入，并绘制数据以交互式地批量标记样本，从而显着减少整个数据集的数据标记的时间和精力。 本文提出一种半监督交互式意图批量标注系统，通过聚类和可视化方法减少数据标注工作量。 Saurav Sahay,Eda Okur,Nagib Hakim,Lama Nachman cs.CL,cs.HC
